title: Order Management & Supplier Operations VA – Shopify Ecommerce (Remote, Long-Term)
description:
ORDER MANAGEMENT & SUPPLIER OPERATIONS VA – SHOPIFY ECOMMERCE (REMOTE)

Remote | Part-Time | 4–6 Hours Per Day | 7 Days a Week

$4.00–$6.00/hour to start | Raises and bonuses for proven performers

-------------------------



ABOUT THE ROLE

We run several growing Shopify dropshipping stores. Every day there are open orders that need follow-up — supplier delays, address issues, refunds, missing tracking. We need someone who owns that pipeline end-to-end so nothing slips.

You will not be left guessing. From day one you get SOPs, ready-made
 templates, structured Google Sheets, and Loom walkthroughs for every recurring task. Your job is to execute them reliably and flag what needs attention.

This is a long-term role. We are not looking for someone for one month — we want someone we can grow with, give more responsibility to, and pay more over time.

-------------------------



WHAT YOU WILL DO

- Monitor open orders across multiple Shopify stores every day

-
 suppliers to resolve fulfillment issues: out of stock, delays, wrong addresses, returns

- Reply to customers about order issues using our existing templates

- Process refunds accurately and log them

- Track stock with suppliers and flag when products need to be paused or relisted

- Keep daily tracking sheets clean and up to date

- Send a short End-of-Day report: what was opened, what was closed, what is still pending

-------------------------



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- Hands-on experience in ecommerce order management, supplier coordination, or dropshipping operations (any combination works — we care about skills, not job titles)

- Able to juggle 30+ open issues across multiple stores without losing track

- Clear, professional written English

- Comfortable in Google Sheets and able to follow detailed SOPs

- Takes initiative — when something is unclear, proposes a solution instead of waiting

- Reliable computer and stable internet

-------------------------



NICE-TO-HAVES

- Direct experience inside the Shopify admin

- Experience with parcel tracking tools (17track, Parcel Panel, AfterShip, etc.)

- Experience preventing chargebacks or working with dispute teams

- Experience negotiating with Chinese suppliers (CJ, LST, agents, etc.)

-------------------------



SCHEDULE — READ THIS BEFORE APPLYING

This role is 7 days a week, 4–6 hours per day. Orders come in every day, including weekends, and they need to be handled every day. If you cannot commit to working 7 days a week, please do not apply — we will not make exceptions, and applying anyway only wastes both our time.

In return, the daily hours stay light (4–6 hours), the work is structured, and good performance is rewarded with raises and bonuses.

-------------------------



HOW TO APPLY

We keep the first step simple. No video required to apply — just a short written reply so we know you read the post and can communicate clearly.



Step 1 — Use this exact subject line:

Order Ops VA Application – ORANGE – [Your Full Name]

(The word ORANGE is how we know you actually read this post. Applications without it are auto-rejected.)



Step 2 — In the body of your message, answer these 4 short questions (1–3 sentences each is enough):

- How long have you worked in ecommerce order management or dropshipping ops, and for what type of stores?

- Describe one fulfillment problem you solved with a supplier — what was the issue and how did you handle it?

- How many open orders / issues are you comfortable managing at the same time?

- Confirm that you are available to work 7 days a week, and list your working hours in your local timezone.



Step 3 — Optional but appreciated:

- A screenshot of an order tracker, supplier
 thread, or process you have built (blur sensitive info)

Shortlisted candidates will be asked to record a 2–3 minute Loom intro and complete a small paid test task before we make an offer.



IMPORTANT: Applications that do not follow the instructions above will not be considered.



-------------------------

If you like clean operations, hate loose ends, and want a stable long-term remote role with an operator who pays attention to good work — apply.

We look forward to your application.

title: SOCIAL MEDIA & OPERATIONS VA — FOREX / FINANCE BRAND
description:
SOCIAL MEDIA & OPERATIONS VA — FOREX / FINANCE BRAND



About the role:

I'm a Dubai-based entrepreneur running a forex network and a personal brand across Instagram, TikTok, Snapchat, and
. I need one highly 
 person to own all social media execution, DM management, and scheduling — so I can focus entirely on strategy and deals.



This is not a creative role. Content is already produced for you by AI tools. Your job is to take that output, schedule it, manage the inbox, and keep everything running on time — every day.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN:



1. Social media scheduling

Post carousels, reels, and stories daily across Instagram, TikTok, and Snapchat using Postly. Follow the content calendar. Nothing misses a day.



2.
 group management

Post daily to multiple
 groups. Reply to members, pin announcements, track engagement. 10+ active groups.



3. DM & inbox management

Handle all incoming DMs on Instagram and Sendpulse. Qualify leads, respond using scripts I provide, escalate anything that needs me.



4. Sendpulse broadcasts

Send broadcast messages to subscriber lists, manage opt-ins, track delivery. Follow templates — no copywriting needed.



5. Multi-account coordination

Manage 10+ Instagram sub-accounts. Schedule posts, coordinate story sequences, track follower growth weekly.



6. Daily reporting

Send a short morning recap: what posted, reply counts, anything flagged. Bullet points only — no long reports.



MUST HAVE:

- Fluent written English

- Available 9am–6pm Dubai time (GST/UTC+4) — non-negotiable

- Experience managing 3+ Instagram accounts simultaneously, professionally

- Familiar with
 (posting, pinning, group admin)

- Comfortable with scheduling tools (Postly, Buffer, Later, or similar)

- Extremely detail-oriented — nothing misses a post, no typos, no wrong accounts

- Reliable internet and power



AUTOMATIC DISQUALIFIERS:

- Generic message that doesn't follow the application format

- Cannot start within 3 days

- Looking for part-time only

- No professional social media management experience



NICE TO HAVE:

- Experience in forex, finance, or trading communities

- Familiar with n8n, Zapier, or automation tools

- Has worked with Sendpulse or ManyChat

- Dutch-speaking is a major bonus



COMPENSATION: $400–$600/month USD, full-time

Performance bonus after 90 days.



HOW TO APPLY:

Send a WhatsApp message to: 
Start your message with: "I read the whole job post."

title: HR Generalist (California Employment Compliance & Recruitment Experience)
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented HR Generalist based in the Philippines to support our US (California) workforce. This role requires hands-on experience in California employment laws, HRIS systems, recruitment, and US benefits administration, including 401(k).

The ideal candidate is someone who has supported California, US-based employees remotely, is confident navigating HR systems, and can independently manage HR operations while ensuring full compliance with federal and California regulations.



Job Details

• Work Setup: Fully Remote (Philippines-based) 

• Schedule: Mondays to Fridays, 8 hours/day; Pacific Standard Time

• Employment Type: Full-time 

• Start Date: ASAP 



Key Responsibilities

• Manage end-to-end HR Generalist functions, including onboarding, offboarding, and employee lifecycle management for US employees 

• Ensure compliance with California labor laws, including wage and hour regulations, leave policies, and employment documentation 

• Utilize and manage HRIS platforms to maintain accurate employee data, generate reports, and streamline HR processes 

• Serve as the go-to resource for HRIS administration, including data entry, audits, troubleshooting, and system updates 

• Support full-cycle recruitment, including job postings, candidate screening, interview coordination, and offer processing 

• Administer US employee benefits, including medical, dental, vision, and retirement plans such as 401(k) 

• Handle benefits enrollment, changes, and employee inquiries, ensuring accuracy and compliance 

• Coordinate and manage leave administration, including FMLA, CFRA, ADA accommodations, and related processes 

• Maintain accurate, up-to-date, and confidential employee records and documentation 

• Partner with payroll teams to validate employee data, benefits deductions, and employment updates 

• Support employee relations by providing guidance aligned with US and California employment laws 

• Assist in drafting, updating, and implementing HR policies and procedures 

• Prepare HR reports, support audits, and ensure timely completion of compliance requirements 



Requirements

• Proven experience as an HR Generalist supporting US-based employees, preferably in California 

• Strong knowledge of California labor laws and employment regulations 

• Hands-on experience with HRIS systems (e.g., employee data management, reporting, system navigation) 

• Demonstrated experience in recruitment and talent acquisition 

• Solid background in US benefits administration, including 401(k) and retirement plans 

• Experience handling employee leave programs such as FMLA, CFRA, ADA, COBRA, and workers’ compensation 

• Experience working in a remote or offshore (Philippines-based) setup supporting US teams 

• Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) 

• High level of accuracy, organization, and attention to detail 

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities

title: SEO & WORDPRESS SPECIALIST FOR AN AGENCY
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re hiring a full-time, hands-on SEO & WordPress Specialist to help manage multiple U.S. client accounts.

If you’re detail-oriented, organized, technically skilled, and ready to produce daily results — this is for you.

You’ll be responsible for handling ongoing SEO work, WordPress updates, page edits, content publishing, and website optimization across multiple client websites. You’ll help our team improve search visibility, keep websites updated, and support lead generation while keeping everything on schedule and consistent.



This is a serious, long-term position with the possibility of future growth within the company — not a side gig.



Salary: $1,100/month + Bonus (Paid Weekly – $250 every Monday after productivity review)

Schedule: 6:00 AM to 2:00 PM, or 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM EST (New York Time)

Hours: 40 Hours/Week – Full Time

Tracker: Time Doctor Required



RESPONSIBILITIES

Perform ongoing on-page SEO for client websites

Update existing website pages and build new pages in WordPress

Create and update service pages, location pages, and landing pages

Optimize title tags, meta descriptions, headings, internal links, images, and on-page content

Publish and format blog posts and other website content

Handle WordPress page edits such as text changes, image swaps, CTA updates, layout improvements, and menu edits

Perform basic technical SEO tasks such as redirects, broken links, indexing checks, sitemap checks, and page speed improvements



Support local SEO tasks including Google Business Profile updates, citation work, and service area optimization

Monitor Google Search Console and Google Analytics for basic SEO performance insights

Assist with weekly and monthly reporting, task tracking, and SEO updates across accounts

Help keep websites updated, organized, functional, and optimized for conversions



WORK REQUIREMENTS & ACCOUNTABILITY

This role is for serious, full-time professionals only.

You will be required to work to get paid — every hour must be productive and verifiable.



MANDATORY:

Time tracking with Time Doctor (screenshots, activity, and hours are reviewed daily by our accountant)

Work Hours: 8 hours per day in between 6am to 5pm window (New York Time)

Minimum 40 hours per week

Fast, stable internet connection

Quiet, private workspace — no background noise or interruptions

Must attend daily Zoom video check-ins (camera on) and be available for phone calls and real-time communication during work hours



Must comply with Confidentiality & NDA Agreements

If you can’t stay consistent, accountable, and available — do not apply



PERFORMANCE & GROWTH

We believe in rewarding results. This is a long-term position with performance reviews every 90 days. Consistent output, reliability, attention to detail, and initiative will lead to salary increases and more responsibility. We reward work ethic, accuracy, productivity, and results — not idle time.

We invest in people who work hard, communicate clearly, follow through, and deliver measurable results.



REQUIREMENTS

Proven experience with SEO and WordPress website management (preferably for U.S. clients)

Strong understanding of on-page SEO, local SEO, and basic technical SEO

Experience updating and building pages in WordPress

Experience with page builders such as Elementor, Gutenberg, Divi, WPBakery, or similar

Familiarity with Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Ahrefs, Semrush, or similar SEO tools

Strong English communication and writing skills

Organized, reliable, and responsive

Honest, self-motivated, detail-oriented, and results-oriented

title: Accounting Technician
description:
About Us



M&A Bookkeeping Inc. is a Canadian bookkeeping and fractional controller firm. We serve small and medium-sized businesses and are growing fast. We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented data entry specialist to join our remote team full-time.



What You'll Do



Enter and categorize transactions in QuickBooks Online for multiple clients

Process receipts, invoices, bills, and bank/credit card statements

Reconcile accounts under the supervision of our bookkeeping team

Maintain accurate, organized records across client files

Flag discrepancies or questions to the team lead promptly



What We're Looking For



Hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online (required)

Familiarity with Canadian tax rules — GST/HST, CRA filing requirements, and Canadian chart of accounts conventions

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to handle multiple client files without mixing things up

Good written English for communicating with our team

Prior experience supporting a Canadian bookkeeping or accounting firm is a strong asset



Work Setup



Full-time, 35 hours/week

Remote — work from home

Daily overlap required: You must be available for at least 1 hour per day during our core window of 7:00am–4:00pm Atlantic Time (AST/ADT), Monday–Friday. This is for daily check-ins and team communication — exact timing is flexible within that window.

Must have a reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace



Compensation



$600–$800 USD/month, depending on experience.



How to Apply



Please apply with:



A short intro about your bookkeeping/data entry experience

Your experience with QuickBooks Online (how long, what tasks)

Any experience with Canadian clients, GST/HST, or CRA-related work

Your available overlap hours within 7:00am–4:00pm Atlantic Time

Your internet setup (speed, backup connection if any)

title: Data Analyst (No Experience Required)
description:
For thousands of years, maps have provided humans with the knowledge they need to make decisions. As a Maps Evaluator, you will have the opportunity to provide ground truth for your town, city or country.



At Peroptyx, we are looking for Data Analysts who will review mapping data for digital mapping applications. Your research capabilities will validate and ensure that the navigation of certain routes are accurate and safe.



As part of this role, you will verify that business names and opening hours are correct. You will check that the distance from a starting point to an end destination is listed accurately, resulting in better user experiences.



With this job you can plan your days around this highly flexible working schedule, work weekends or late evenings, all from the comfort of your own office. The flexibility of our roles minimizes the impact on your daily routine. So, whether you are a student looking to earn as you learn, a retiree looking for a new challenge, a part
 time professional or a work from home parent, Peroptyx has the right role for you!



The Ideal Candidate



- Fluent in English

- Excellent research skills.

- Excellent local knowledge of your home country.

- Good understanding and general knowledge of the geography and culture of the Philippines.

- Analytical mindset.



Job Requirements



- Must be living in the Philippines for a minimum of 5 consecutive years.

- Must be willing to work a minimum of 10 hours and up to 20 hours per week depending on task availability.

- Good working knowledge of search engines, map applications and familiarity with social media platforms.

- Strong ability to learn, understand and apply multiple sets of different instructions.

- All work must be of an independent nature.



Technical requirements to perform the work:



Access to a laptop or computer which uses:

- A logon account unique to you

- Anti-virus solution that is kept up to date, with regular scans performed

- Only one member per household may apply

NB. All products should be provided at your own expense.



Benefits

· Work up to 20 hours per week.

· Earn a competitive rate of pay.

· Develop your research skills.

· Avoid the long commute.

· Work from the comfort of your home office.

· Enjoy the flexibility of setting your own working hours!



Apply Online Today!

title: Procurement Officer (for Amazon Private Label)
description:
About our company:



We are a European-based E-commerce company with 9 private label brands. We are looking for new products for which the packaging design is not done efficiently. We then make it more efficient, and this gives us a competitive advantage. For that development process, we sometimes have to change the product design, open new factory molds, or need to come up with other creative solutions. When our products are developed (by you in collaboration with a Chinese factory) and produced, our Supply Chain management from China to Europe works as follows: We usually have one 40ft EXW shipment per month from China to Europe that is set for a specific departure date. For this shipment, all orders from different suppliers (with production times ranging from 15-60 days) should arrive in time. All information (CI and PL) from all suppliers must be combined so that the customs clearance process is easy. This entire process is not documented in the form of SOPs yet, so we will have to create them together during the first month.



What We Are Looking For :



We are seeking an experienced professional who can take ownership of the entire product development and logistics process. (Initially a part-time role, with full-time opportunities potentially becoming available later.)



Your responsibilities will include:

- Product development and sourcing from China

- Minimum of 5 years of experience in private label procurement.

- Product quality control

- Ensuring efficient packaging and carton sizing

- Accounting support, including creating and verifying invoices

- Supply chain planning

- Managing lead times and shipping timelines (minimum 5 years of experience required).

- Supply forecasting and inventory management

- Managing international shipments



(You will be responsible for overseeing the full workflow—from product development to logistics coordination.)



You must have:



- At least 5 years of experience working with Chinese suppliers for FBA and private label businesses

- Advanced proficiency in Excel/Google Sheets

- Experience in data analysis

- Proven experience managing international shipments



What You Will Get:

Work mostly during Philippine hours to stay in contact with China, but you will also need to be available in the evening (until 22:00–00:00 PH time) to communicate with our European-based office.

title: Appointment setter
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a sharp, energetic appointment setter to make outbound calls to business leads in the United States. Your one job is simple: call prospects, have a real conversation, and get them to book a call on our calendar.

This is a long-term remote role. If you perform well, you grow with us.



What You Will Do Every Day

Make 60–80 outbound calls per day to warm and cold US business leads

Follow a proven script and handle common objections confidently

Book qualified appointments directly into our calendar (Calendly)

Update a daily call log with dials, conversations, bookings, and notes

Send a WhatsApp end-of-day report with your numbers

Attend a brief daily check-in call with the team



You Are the Right Person If You Have...

Clear, confident spoken English — neutral or near-neutral accent

At least 1 year of outbound calling, BPO, or telemarketing experience

Experience handling objections like "I'm not interested" or "Send me an
"

A quiet home workspace, reliable internet (wired preferred), and a good headset

Experience with any dialer tool (VICI Dial, Mojo, JustCall, or similar)

Discipline to work independently — no micromanaging, but we track numbers daily



Work Setup

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM US Eastern Time

Location: Work from home — Philippines only

Equipment: Your own laptop/desktop, headset, and stable internet connection

Payment: Wise bank transfer or GCash — paid monthly base + weekly commission

Start date: As soon as possible — we move fast



We shortlist within 48 hours. Top candidates will be invited to a short Zoom interview and a mock call. Final hire goes through a paid 7-day trial and onboarding

title: content editor for social media
description:
CONTENT EDITOR WANTED — Remote | Immediate Start

I’m looking for a talented, results-driven content editor to join my team and manage video editing across my social media platforms — TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
/X.

The Volume

You’ll be editing approximately 120 videos per month. This is a high-output role and you must be comfortable working at pace without compromising quality.

YOU MUST HAVE PREVIOUS EXPERIANCE

The Role

 • Edit short-form and longer-form video content using B-roll I provide plus additional footage you source yourself

 • Create voiceover-ready reels — fully edited to picture with music, captions and pacing, ready for me to record over

 • Pitch weekly content ideas across all verticals — you tell me what videos I need to make, then you edit them

 • Schedule and post content to 
 and
/X (I handle Instagram myself)

 • Stay on top of what’s trending and what’s actually working on social media right now — hooks, formats, audio, algorithm behaviour

The Businesses You’ll Be Creating Content For

All content must attract the right audience and convert them into customers across these three areas:

 1. Ecom Course (£49) — Educational content targeting aspiring entrepreneurs

 2. Football Tipping Group — Sports and betting content to attract the right community

 3. Property Development / Bali Investment — Aspirational lifestyle and investment content targeting high-net-worth buyers

 4. Lifestyle Content — Personal brand content to get my face out there and build trust and recognition

What I Need From You

 • Innovative thinking — don’t just edit, bring ideas to the table

 • A strong understanding of what makes content go viral and drive real engagement

 • Ability to work across multiple niches simultaneously

 • Self-managed with reliable turnaround times

 • Familiar with scheduling tools for 
 and
/X

Previous Experience Is Essential

You must have proven experience growing a creator’s or business’s social media presence through your editing work. When applying you must provide hard stats to back this up — follower growth, view counts, engagement rates, or revenue driven by content you edited. Case studies, screenshots and portfolio links all accepted. No proof of results = no reply.

To Apply, Send:

 1. Your portfolio — links to short-form content you’ve edited

 2. Hard stats showing the results your work has driven

 3. Three content ideas — one for each business vertical listed above

 4. A brief intro about yourself, your editing setup and your availability

title: Customer serivce support
description:
About the Role

We are looking for an experienced Dispute Manager / Customer Service Manager with proven dropshipping experience to join our growing e-commerce team. You will be responsible for overseeing customer service operations for multiple dropshipping stores, with a strong focus on dispute resolution, including chargebacks and PayPal disputes.

This role is specifically suited for someone who has hands-on experience in dropshipping customer service, understands the unique challenges of supplier-related issues, shipping delays, refunds, and dispute management, and knows how to balance customer satisfaction with business protection.

You should be detail-oriented, calm under pressure, and experienced in handling complex customer cases that cannot be resolved by automated systems alone.



Key Responsibilities

Manage customer service operations for multiple dropshipping stores

Handle complex customer cases escalated from our AI customer service bot, particularly those related to shipping, supplier issues, and refunds

Manage and dispute chargebacks (Visa, Mastercard, etc.)

Handle PayPal disputes and claims professionally and efficiently

Collect, organize, and submit compelling evidence to win disputes and chargebacks

Work with and optimize chargeback prevention tools and apps

Maintain clear, professional communication with customers while protecting the business

Monitor dispute ratios and implement strategies to reduce future disputes

Collaborate with the team to improve customer service workflows specifically for dropshipping operations



Requirements

Minimum 2 years of experience in customer service and/or dispute handling, preferably within dropshipping

Proven experience with chargebacks and PayPal disputes is required

Demonstrable experience in dropshipping customer service is a must

Familiarity with chargeback prevention tools/apps is a plus

Strong written English communication skills

Highly organized, reliable, and detail-oriented

Able to work independently and make well-judged decisions

Comfortable handling supplier-related issues, shipping delays, and refund disputes



What We Offer

A friendly, supportive, and professional work environment

Fully remote position

Long-term collaboration for the right candidate

Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling dropshipping e-commerce business



How to Apply

Please apply with:

A short introduction about yourself

Your relevant experience in dropshipping customer service, chargebacks, and PayPal disputes

Examples (if possible) of disputes or chargebacks you have successfully handled

We look forward to working with someone who takes ownership of customer satisfaction while protecting the company’s interests in a fast-paced dropshipping environment.

title: eCommerce VSL Video Editor
description:
Company Description



We are a fast-growing ecommerce store that sells different products through such acquisition platforms as Meta ads, Google ads, Amazon, Klaviyo, Tiktok, Instagram, etc.







Role Description



This is a remote contract role for an Ecommerce Video Editor. The video editor will be responsible for editing new VSL, UGC, mashup, and other types of videos on weekly basis using the scripts provided, and offering data-driven insights to shape overall strategy. In this role, you will also be tasked with honing new skills such as working with AI tools, creating motion designs, researching the content on Instagram, Tiktok, Youtube etc.







Qualifications



Proven experience in creating high-converting video ads for ecommerce brands, with a strong understanding of VSLs and UGC content editing.

Strong analytical skills to assess video performance metrics and optimize for engagement, conversion rates, and return on ad spend (ROAS)

Deep proficiency in video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, or similar) and familiarity with motion graphics, transitions, and dynamic text overlays.

Experience in editing videos for paid media platforms, including
 Ads, Google Ads (Performance Max etc), and YouTube Ads.

At least 3 years of experience in ecommerce video editing, specifically for direct-to-consumer (DTC) and VSLs (long video-sales letters)



Excellent command of English (C1 level or higher) for seamless team communication and collaboration.



Availability to work on Eastern Standard Time (EST) with flexibility for tight deadlines and occasional weekend work.

Key traits we value: proactiveness, creativity, adaptability, attention to detail, and the ability to take brand storytelling to the next level.





How to Apply:



Option 1 - Google Form (preferred): Please complete this form if you are interested:

Ensure your resume highlights your relevant experience to clearly demonstrate how your skills meet the specific requirements outlined in the job description.

title: Motion Designer & Video Editor
description:
We are seeking a creative and reliable Motion Designer & Video Editor to join our team on a per-project basis. If you have a sharp eye for pacing, slick typography, and can transform static brand identities into compelling visual stories, we want to hear from you.



The Role

You will provide high-quality motion graphics and video support across various brand-focused projects. 



Key responsibilities include:



- Brand Case Studies: Creating engaging animations and video support to showcase brand impact.

- Brand Motion: Developing "simple but slick" logo animations, confident typography reveals, and seamless transitions.

- Video Editing: Crafting professional edits using stock libraries—focusing on intentional cutting, rhythmic pacing, and adding light motion overlays.

- Technical Delivery: Managing clean exports and ensuring content is optimized for the correct ratios and codecs.



About You

- Creative & Imaginative: You bring fresh ideas and understand how to elevate a visual concept.

- Technically Solid: You are disciplined with your workflow and work efficiently.

- Reliable & Responsive: You pride yourself on clear communication and a fast turnaround.

- Budget-Conscious: You are comfortable working within sensible, per-project budgets.



Trial Task & Application

We value your time and talent. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a paid trial task to ensure a good fit for both parties.



To apply, please include the following:



Portfolio: A link to your showreel or recent examples of brand-focused motion work.

Availability: Your typical turnaround time for a 30-second brand animation.

Project Rate: Your standard rate or range for project-based work.



We look forward to seeing your work!

title: B2B Lead Generation Specialist (LinkedIn + Cold Email)  - FinTech Niche UK
description:
Hi, I'm Chris — founder of a boutique B2B lead generation agency based in London (Level39, Canary Wharf). We run outreach campaigns for fintech and SaaS scale-ups in the UK, booking qualified sales meetings with decision-makers.

I'm looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Campaign Operator to join me long-term. This is not a general VA role — I need someone who understands LinkedIn outreach, cold
 sequences, and lead list building.

Before you apply — read this carefully:

Start your application message with the word PIPELINE. Applications without this word will not be reviewed.



What you'll do:

Build targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator and 
 — filtering by job title, company size, industry, and location (UK focus).

Run LinkedIn outreach campaigns using Heyreach — sending connection requests and follow-up message sequences to 50–80 contacts per day per campaign.

Run cold
 sequences using Instantly.ai — managing sending limits, monitoring deliverability, and handling bounce/unsubscribe lists.

Manage replies daily — categorise responses (interested / not now / not interested / question), escalate hot leads to me immediately, and book meetings directly into client calendars via Calendly.

Update the campaign tracker in Notion every day — logging sent, replied, booked, and any issues.

Report weekly KPIs: messages sent, reply rates, meetings booked, show-up rates.



Who I'm Looking For:

You have at least 1 year of experience running LinkedIn outreach or cold
 campaigns — ideally for a lead gen agency or a B2B SaaS/fintech company.

You are familiar with at least one of these tools: Heyreach, Expandi, Instantly.ai, Smartlead, 
, LinkedIn Sales Navigator.

You are proactive — if something isn't working (low reply rates, LinkedIn warning), you flag it immediately and suggest a fix. You don't wait to be asked.

You pay attention to detail — prospect lists are clean, CRM is updated daily, messages go out on schedule.

Your written English is strong — you will be managing replies and writing short follow-up messages.

You are available Monday to Friday, overlapping at least 3–4 hours with UK business hours (GMT/BST).



What I offer:

Long-term stable engagement — I'm building this for the next 2–3 years minimum, not a one-off project.

Part-time to start (20h/week) — moving to full-time (40h/week) within 4–6 weeks as campaigns scale.

Starting rate: $5–7/hour during the 2-week paid trial period.

After trial: $700–$900/month full-time retainer, paid monthly via Wise.

Performance bonus: $50–$100/month when weekly KPI targets are consistently exceeded.

Clear SOPs provided from day one — you won't be guessing what to do.

Direct access to me (not through layers of management) — fast decisions, clear feedback.



Tools we use:

LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Heyreach, Instantly.ai, 
, Notion, Calendly, Loom, Wise (for payments).



To apply:

Send me a message starting with the word PIPELINE, then answer these three questions:

1. What LinkedIn outreach or cold
 tools have you used, and for how long?

2. Describe one outreach campaign you ran — what was the ICP, how many contacts, and what was the reply rate?

3. What's your current availability (hours per day, timezone, overlap with UK hours)?

Applications without the word PIPELINE or without answers to all three questions will not be reviewed.

title: Operations Manager
description:
Job Title: Operations Manager

Company: Agency Growth Partner (AGP) 

Compensation: $4,000 USD/month + Performance Bonus

Timezone Requirement: Most Overlap with GMT+2 (Africa/Johannesburg)



OVERVIEW 



Agency Growth Partner (AGP) is a fast-growing agency that builds client acquisition systems for other marketing agencies. We are looking for a Senior Operations Manager to run our day-to-day business.



The main problem you will solve: Our founder is currently the bottleneck. Decisions, hiring, and firing flow through him. Your job is to take ownership of operations, so projects ship and the business grows without his daily involvement. 





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 

- Hiring & Onboarding: Manage the full hiring cycle and ensure new hires ramp up fast with clear first-week plans. 

- People Management: Run 1:1s, manage performance, and hold the team accountable to deadlines. 

- Project Ownership: Plan, assign, and unblock projects. Ensure work ships on time and to standard. 

- Scorecard & Reporting: Track revenue, cash, leads, and capacity weekly. Give the founder a clean update: what shipped, what is stuck, decisions needed. 

- SOPs & Systems: Keep our Notion and Slack workflows clean, simple, and up to date. 

- Finance Admin: Handle basic invoices, contractor payments, and flag financial risks early. 



REQUIREMENTS:



- Proven experience in an operations management role (agency experience is a major plus). 

- Strong systems thinker who defaults to writing things down. 

- Comfortable having tough accountability conversations. 

- Must be able to work full-time with hours overlapping the GMT+2 timezone. 



How to Apply: 



Please submit your application via our official form. You will be required to record a short Loom video explaining why you are a fit for this role.

title: Video Editor For 1,600,000+ Subscriber Channel (Premiere Pro Template Expert)
description:
To apply, fill out this form: 



What is the company?



We run multiple YouTube channels in-house, each with over a million subscribers. It is a network of channels, all under one roof. We are a London-based startup focused on making viral videos.



Every video is fast-moving, ambitious, and built to get millions of views.



What will you be doing?



You will be our in-house video editor, working across different channels and different styles alongside a team that has been inside of YouTube for over a decade, working with some of the largest YouTubers on earth. Sometimes you will work on the same format. Other times you will be building something completely new. Either way, you will grow faster here than anywhere else.



But this is not a normal editing job. Yes, you will edit videos. But more importantly, you will be the person who designs the look and feel of our channels by creating reusable templates and original animations that make every video look incredible, and that make our production pipeline fast.



In plain English: you will build things in After Effects (animations, characters, graphics) and turn them into templates that can be dropped into Premiere Pro, where you or another editor can swap in new text, images, or data without rebuilding anything from scratch. This is what allows a small team to produce content across multiple channels at scale.



Responsibilities include:



- Editing full videos in Premiere Pro with strong pacing, storytelling instincts, and an understanding of what keeps viewers watching.

- Creating original animations, characters, and illustrated assets from scratch in After Effects. Not using pre-made packs, but actually designing and animating them yourself.

- Building reusable Premiere Pro templates (called MOGRTs, which are essentially animations you build once in After Effects that anyone can customise inside Premiere Pro by swapping in text, colours, or images without touching the original file).

- Developing visual systems for different video formats: intros, outros, lower thirds, transitions, title cards, data overlays, subscribe animations, and recurring segment graphics.

- Working across multiple YouTube channels, adapting your style and creative approach to suit different audiences and content types.

- Collaborating closely with creators and the founding team to translate briefs and ideas into polished, on-brand content.

- Keeping project files, template libraries, and assets organised so the team can move quickly across channels.

- Staying on top of what is working on YouTube (trends, pacing styles, visual techniques) and bringing fresh ideas to the table.



About you



- You are ambitious, creative, and genuinely excited by the idea of shaping the visual identity of channels that millions of people watch every day.

- You are not the kind of editor who waits to be told exactly what to do. You have your own ideas, your own style, and you want the freedom to bring them to life.



You should be:



- Highly skilled in After Effects and Premiere Pro, with the ability to both edit videos and create animations and templates from scratch.

- Question for the form: link us to a piece of work you created from scratch that you are most proud of, and tell us why.

- A strong visual thinker who can design characters, scenes, and motion graphics from a blank canvas. Not just someone who applies pre-made effects.

- Fast. You can take a brief, turn it around quickly, and iterate without losing quality. Speed matters here.

- Creative. You have original ideas and are always thinking about how to make something look better, feel sharper, or hit harder.

- Someone who has edited real content before. Experience with YouTube, creators, or viral content is a major plus.

- Comfortable taking ownership and solving problems independently.

- Organised and disciplined, delivering on time and communicating clearly.

- Curious, adaptable, and always improving your craft.

- Excited by YouTube, the creator economy, and the idea of building something from scratch.



Why you would want this job



- Most editing roles give you one channel, one style, one type of video. Here, you get to work across a network of channels with millions of subscribers, each with a different creative challenge. Your work will be seen by millions of real viewers, not buried in a corporate content library.

- You will work directly with a team that has spent over a decade inside YouTube, working with some of the biggest creators on the platform. You will have real creative input. Not just executing someone else's vision, but shaping how entire channels look and feel.



Other benefits include:



- Creative variety across different channels, different styles, and different problems to solve.

- Your work reaches millions of real people, fast.

- Fast-growing startup with real potential for long-term career growth.

- A fun, creative, no-bureaucracy environment where good ideas win regardless of who has them.



Payment and Terms



Base: $1,250 USD per month (plus performance-based bonuses when deadlines are hit).

Hours: 40 hours per week (exclusive of breaks)

Weekends: Off

Holidays: Paid (dates flexible)



How to apply



Fill out the form below



To apply, fill out this form: 



We will respond to successful applicants within 24 hours of submitting on steps moving forward.

title: Accountant – Airbnb short term Property Management Company
description:
Accountant – Property Management & Short-Term Rental (STR)

Company Overview



We are an Australian property management company specializing in short-term rental (Airbnb) management, delivering professional services across both long-term and short-term rental portfolios. Our team operates in a fast-paced, high-volume environment with a strong focus on efficiency, accuracy, and growth.



Role Overview



As an Accountant, you will independently manage day-to-day financial operations within a property management environment. This role is ideal for a highly organized and detail-oriented professional who is confident handling end-to-end accounting processes in a fast-paced setting with multiple deadlines.



Key Responsibilities (including but not limited to)

Manage full-cycle trust accounting, including reconciliation and disbursements

Handle accounts payable (AP) and accounts receivable (AR) end-to-end

Process payments related to cleaning fees and short-term rental (STR) transactions

Maintain clear and professional communication via
 and Slack

Prepare financial documents, reports, filings, and purchase orders

Support and oversee financial operations related to short-term rentals

Work with platforms such as Airbnb and Hostaway, including financial tracking, reconciliation, and reporting



Key Requirements

Strong attention to detail with a high level of accuracy and accountability

Proven experience in accounts payable, bookkeeping, or property accounting

Ability to independently manage full accounting processes

Familiarity with Airbnb and Hostaway financial workflows and reporting

Comfortable working across multiple systems and meeting strict deadlines

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Highly organized, proactive, and able to work with minimal supervision

Experience with trust accounting or property management systems is highly desirable

Motivated to grow and take ownership of accounting responsibilities



Hiring Process & Compensation

We are looking to onboard 2–3 candidates for an initial training phase

Training Period (Weeks 1–2): USD $70 per candidate per week

Candidates are required to commit a minimum of 3 hours per day

After training, one candidate will be selected for the next stage

Probation Period (3 months): USD $800/month

Upon successful completion of probation and demonstrated ability to independently manage all responsibilities:

? Salary increases to USD $1,000/month

title: Estimator / CAD Draftsperson – Signage & Fabrication (Remote)
description:
Full-time | Day Shift (7:30am–4:30pm PH Time, with 1-hour unpaid lunch) | Long-term Role with Excellent Remuneration



About the Role



We’re looking for a skilled, reliable, and detail-oriented Estimator to join an established Australian manufacturing and signage business in a long-term remote role.



This is an excellent opportunity for someone with estimating, drafting, or fabrication-related experience who wants stable full-time work, strong pay, and the chance to grow with a respected company.



In this role, you’ll prepare detailed cost estimates, drawings, and written instructions for custom fabrication and signage projects. You’ll review drawings and specifications, calculate materials and labour, help clarify job requirements, and support clear production documentation so projects run smoothly from quoting through to manufacture.



This role will suit someone who enjoys technical work, likes solving problems, and takes pride in producing accurate, well-organised work.



Why This Role Is a Great Opportunity



This is a rare opportunity to secure a long-term position with an established Australian business that values quality, reliability, and professionalism.



You won’t be treated like a disposable freelancer. You’ll be brought on as a valued tea
mber whose work matters and whose contribution is recognised.



The company offers excellent remuneration, consistent hours, and the opportunity to build your skills in a technical and respected industry.



You’ll receive support and guidance as you get started, with the opportunity to become more independent over time as your confidence and knowledge grow.



If you are looking for job security, professional growth, and a supportive remote working environment, this is a role worth applying for.



Key Responsibilities



- Review drawings, sketches, and specifications to identify material and labour requirements

- Prepare accurate cost estimates using spreadsheets and internal systems

- Create CAD models, detailed drawings, and written fabrication instructions

- Liaise with customers to clarify project requirements when needed

- Enter job and costing information into an ERP system

- Maintain cost libraries and help improve estimating templates and systems

- Support production documentation and workflow improvements



Skills & Experience



Must Have:



- Experience in estimating, drafting, or production support within signage, fabrication, engineering, or manufacturing

- Ability to read and interpret technical drawings, PDFs, sketches, and related job information

- Strong computer skills, including spreadsheets and confidence using technical software

- Experience with, or solid working knowledge of, software such as Adobe Illustrator, AutoCAD, or 3D CAD

- Strong English communication skills, written and spoken

- Reliable internet connection and strong work discipline



Nice to Have:



- Experience with ERP systems

- Background in sign manufacturing, metal fabrication, plastic fabrication, or similar industries

- Experience with aluminium, plastics, fabrication processes, or production documentation

- Engineering, drafting, or other technical qualification



Who You Are



- You are accurate, organised, and detail-focused

- You enjoy technical work and problem-solving

- You like improving systems and helping work flow more smoothly

- You communicate clearly and professionally when working remotely

- You want a long-term role where you can grow and become a trusted part of the team

- You are comfortable working across both estimating and technical documentation tasks



Work Setup



- Remote, full-time (Monday–Friday)

- Hours: 7:30am–4:30pm PH time, with 1-hour unpaid lunch

- Alternative shift may also be available: 8:30am–5:30pm PH time

- All communication via
, chat, and video



What We Offer



- Excellent salary and reliable, on-time pay

- Long-term, stable employment

- Training and support as you learn the role

- Opportunities for growth and increased responsibility over time

- Supportive and respectful team culture

- The chance to contribute to real process improvement and technical workflow development



How to Apply



Please apply using our online application form here: 



To apply, you will need to detail the following in the application form.



1. What experience do you have in estimating, interpreting technical drawings, or preparing fabrication drawings/CAD work?

2. What industries have you worked in that relate to signage, plastic fabrication, metal fabrication, or manufacturing?

3. What software have you used for estimating or technical work (for example Excel, Google Sheets, Adobe Illustrator, AutoCAD, 3D CAD, or ERP systems)?

4. What are your expected monthly salary (in PHP) and availability?



Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

title: Finance / Debt Collection Virtual Assistant
description:
About Property Webmasters



Property Webmasters is a leading provider of cutting edge web solutions for the real estate industry. We empower businesses to thrive online through exceptional design, robust functionality, and strategic digital marketing.



As we continue to grow, maintaining strong financial operations and healthy cash flow is essential. We are looking for a detail oriented and proactive Finance / Debt Collection Virtual Assistant to support our finance team and ensure timely payment collection.



The Opportunity



This role is more than just chasing payments. It is about protecting the financial health of the business while maintaining strong client relationships.



You will work closely with the finance and account management teams, taking ownership of accounts receivable, following up on outstanding invoices, and helping streamline debt collection processes.



Your contribution will directly impact cash flow, client retention, and operational efficiency.



What You Will Bring to the Table (Required Skills)



Accounts Receivable Management

Experience managing invoices, tracking outstanding balances, and maintaining accurate financial records.



Debt Collection Experience

Proven ability to follow up on overdue accounts via
 and calls in a professional and effective manner.



Client Communication

Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to handle sensitive payment discussions while maintaining positive client relationships.



Attention to Detail

Highly organized with strong attention to detail when managing financial data, payment records, and follow ups.



Financial Systems Familiarity

Experience using accounting or CRM systems such as Xero, QuickBooks, or similar platforms.



Time Management

Ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple accounts, and meet deadlines consistently.



What We Are Looking For in Future Growth (Desirable Skills)



Process Improvement Mindset

Ability to identify inefficiencies in collection processes and suggest improvements.



Automation Awareness

Interest in using automation tools such as
 workflows, reminders, or CRM automations to improve collection efficiency.



Basic Financial Analysis

Ability to review aging reports and identify high risk accounts.



Negotiation Skills

Confidence in proposing payment plans and resolving payment issues.



Cross Team Collaboration

Ability to work closely with sales and account managers to resolve client payment concerns.



Key Responsibilities



-Monitor and manage accounts receivable and aging reports

-Follow up on overdue invoices via
 and calls

-Maintain accurate records of all client communications and payments

-Coordinate with internal teams to resolve billing discrepancies

-Assist in setting up payment plans where required

-Generate regular reports on outstanding balances and collection progress

-Support process improvements to enhance collection efficiency



Why Join Property Webmasters



-Impactful Work

-Collaborative Environment

-Professional Growth

-Competitive Compensation

title: Account Manager / Relationship Manager
description:
At Property Webmasters, we deliver world-class property marketing solutions to clients across the globe. Established in 2006, we have partnered with some of the most prestigious estate agencies and property portals, becoming market leaders in Europe. As we continue expanding worldwide, we are looking for driven individuals to grow with us.



We pride ourselves on attention to detail and continuous improvement. We focus on the small things that make a big difference. If you are not open to feedback and constant growth, this may not be the right fit.



The Role



As an Account Manager / Relationship Manager, you will be responsible for managing client relationships while also leading strategy and briefing work to internal teams. You will act as the bridge between clients and delivery teams, ensuring that ideas are translated into clear, actionable plans and executed to a high standard.



This role is both strategic and operational - you will not just manage accounts, but actively shape campaigns and ensure high-quality delivery.

* Ensure client satisfaction and long-term retention

* Ability to *think strategically and translate ideas into clear briefs*

* Strong organizational and project management skills

* Analytical mindset with a focus on performance and results

* Confident in managing client expectations and conversations

* Proactive, solution-oriented, and detail-focused

About You

title: Supply Chain & Operations Manager (Shopify E-commerce)
description:
About Us



We are an e-commerce fashion store focused on women’s clothing, primarily selling in Canada. We operate through Shopify and advertise via Meta 
 & Instagram).



Our goal is to build a smooth, scalable system where orders, shipping and customer communication run efficiently and without issues.



To support this growth, we are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented **Supply Chain & Operations Manager**.



---



Role Overview



You will be responsible for managing the full order flow from **order placement to final delivery**.



Your job is to ensure everything runs smoothly behind the scenes, prevent issues before they happen, and keep all systems up to date.



You will also be responsible for monitoring product and order quality, and reporting this back clearly so we can improve and scale.



This is a long-term role with growth potential.



---



Responsibilities



Order & Fulfillment Monitoring



* Check Shopify daily for new orders

* Monitor fulfillment status (fulfilled / unfulfilled)

* Ensure all orders are processed correctly

* Identify and fix stuck or delayed orders



---



Tracking & Shipping Control



* Verify that tracking numbers are added correctly

* Ensure tracking updates are working

* Monitor delivery progress

* Flag any delays or issues early



---



Supplier Communication



* Communicate directly with suppliers

* Request updates on orders and shipping

* Follow up on delays or missing information

* Ensure suppliers meet expected timelines



---



Quality Control 



* Monitor product quality based on customer feedback and returns

* Identify patterns (e.g. sizing issues, defects, delays)

* Report issues clearly and proactively

* Suggest improvements to prevent future problems

* Perform regular checks on active products



---



System & Process Control



* Keep Shopify clean and organized

* Check for errors in order flow

* Improve workflow where possible

* Make sure everything runs efficiently



---



Problem Prevention



* Detect potential issues early

* Prevent customer complaints and disputes

* Ensure customers receive correct and timely deliveries



---



Requirements



* Experience with Shopify (order management & fulfillment)

* Experience working with international suppliers (China preferred)

* Strong communication skills (English required)

* Highly detail-oriented

* Proactive mindset (you solve problems before they happen)

* Organized and structured



---



Nice to Have



* Experience in dropshipping or e-commerce operations

* Experience with tracking tools (Parcel Panel or similar)

* Understanding of logistics and shipping flows



---



What We Offer



* Long-term cooperation

* Clear SOPs and structured workflow

* Daily communication and support

* Opportunity to grow into a key role within the company



---



Working Hours



* Starting with 2–3 hours per day

* Scaling to 3–5 hours per day over time



---



How to Apply



Please answer the following:



1. What is your experience with Shopify order management?

2. Have you worked with suppliers before?

3. How would you handle delayed orders?

4. How do you identify quality issues in products?

5. How many hours are you available per week?



To confirm you have read everything, include the word “anchor” in your application.

title: Tiktok Style Short-Form Video Editor (Ads & Content)
description:
We’re looking for a video editor who actually cares about the final product.



• Not someone who speed-runs edits.

• Not someone who just throws clips together.



• We want someone who understands what makes content convert AND feel good to watch.



**What We’re Looking For:**

• Someone who takes pride in their work

• Strong sense of pacing, hooks, and retention

• Ability to edit for performance (ads, engagement, scroll-stopping 
nts)

• Ability to adapt to different styles (nostalgic / Y2K / raw footage vibes)

• Willing to go the extra mile to make an edit hit

• Able to think for themselves and go beyond given instructions

• Brings creative input, not just execution

• Open to feedback and improving with each version

• Must be comfortable using CapCut (required)



**THE TYPE OF CONTENT**



• Short-form content (TikTok / Reels)

• Paid ads + organic content

• Product-focused storytelling

• Hook-driven, fast-paced, high-retention edits

• Nostalgic, raw, “real-life” aesthetic (not overproduced)



**NOT A FIT IF YOU**



• Rush through edits just to deliver fast

• Don’t understand hooks or retention

• Only follow instructions without adding creative thought

• Reuse the same style on everything

• Don’t pay attention to small details (this matters a lot)



**HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)**



• Exactly 3 of your best edits (no more, no less) [TikTok Style]

• Put them in a Google Drive folder

• Name the folder: (Your Name / TOS Editor Position)

• Make sure access is enabled and send the link

• Include a short note on how you approach editing



****IF YOU SEND A FULL PORTFOLIO, MORE THAN 3 EDITS, OR DON’T FOLLOW THESE INSTRUCTIONS EXACTLY, YOUR APPLICATION WILL BE SKIPPED.****



**LONG-TERM VISION We’re not looking for a one-off editor.**



We want to build with someone long-term - someone who wants to grow alongside the brand.

As the brand scales, your role, creative input, and opportunities will grow with it.

We value people who want to improve, evolve their style, and be part of something bigger over time - not just complete tasks.

If you’re looking for a place where your work actually matters and you can develop as a creative, this is for you.

title: Paid Media Video Editor – Short-Form + Long-Form Expert
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled and detail-oriented Video Editor to join our creative team part-time. This role focuses exclusively on crafting video ads for paid social—ranging from short-form (6–30s) to long-form (30–120s) creatives. You will work closely with our Creative Strategist to turn structured creative briefs into visually engaging, high-converting ads for Meta platforms 
/Instagram), TikTok, and YouTube.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Edit and produce short- and long-form video ads using existing assets (video, UGC, b-roll, static)



Follow storytelling and performance frameworks (PAS, AIDA, Problem–Solution–CTA, testimonials, etc.)



Maintain visual appeal while focusing on performance optimization (e.g. scroll stop, pacing, retention)



Create multiple versions and formats for creative testing and platform variations



Implement precise feedback from Creative Strategist and adapt based on performance KPIs



Maintain organized file management, naming conventions, and follow SOPs



Ensure clean delivery of final files (ratios, subtitles, formats for Meta, TikTok, YouTube)



QUALIFICATIONS

Proven experience as a video editor for paid advertising (portfolio required)



Skilled in editing both short (6–30s) and long-form (30–120s) performance ads



Strong understanding of ad structures and conversion-focused storytelling



Proficient in editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, etc.)



Precise, fast-working, structured, and responsive to feedback



Coachable and fast learner – understands instructions quickly and asks the right questions



Basic knowledge of creative KPIs (Hook Rate, CTR, Watch Time, etc.) is a plus



MUST ALSO HAVE:

A dedicated home office setup conducive to professional video editing tasks.

High-speed internet connection (over 50 Mbps).

A high-performance computer capable of handling extensive video editing software.



WORKING HOURS & COMPENSATION

Part-Time Position: ~4 hours per day (Mon–Fri), ideally between 9 am – 1 pm Manila Time

Compensation: $400 USD per month (with room to grow as performance scales)

Long-term collaboration preferred



HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered, please submit:

Your updated resume highlighting relevant experience



A 2–3 minute introduction video (uploaded to Vimeo or YouTube) – Tell us about your background and why you're a great fit



3–5 examples of video ads or social media campaigns you've edited



NOTE: Incomplete applications will not be considered. We are looking for someone who values clarity, precision, and creativity.

We are excited to review your creative and professional qualifications!

description:

title: Creative Strategist (UGC & Paid Ads)

The role also requires ongoing analysis of content performance and continuous iteration based on results.

Applicants must provide proof of past performance, either through experience working with established brands or by showcasing high-performing creatives.

title: Experienced WebDeveloper, SEO, GHL and Marketing Assistant 5+ years of agency experience
description:
Role Overview

JSK Advisory is a fast-growing digital marketing agency and consultancy working with clients across finance, professional services, and ecommerce. We combine sharp strategy with AI-powered systems to deliver results — and we're scaling quickly.



We're looking for a proactive, detail-oriented Website Designer experienced in both Go High Level (GHL) and WordPress

(Elementor preferred). You should have a strong eye for design that converts, a solid grasp of on-page SEO fundamentals, and — most importantly — an entrepreneurial mindset. We don't micromanage. We want someone who takes ownership, solves problems independently, and grows with the business.



In return, you'll get hands-on training in cutting-edge AI tools, AI agents, and the systems reshaping digital marketing. But we're looking for self-starters and fast learners — not people who need hand-holding.



Key Responsibilities

Able to design asethetically pleasing website from scratch in WordPress (Elementor) and Go High Level.

Customise templates or design from following brand guidelines.

Implement basic on-page SEO (meta tags, headers, keyword placement, internal linking).

Ensure websites are mobile-optimised and load quickly.

Set up and integrate forms, calendars, and automations inside GHL.

Set up Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Google Tag Manager,
 Pixel, and necessary plugins on WordPress for the generation campaigns. 

Conduct quality checks to ensure usability, speed, and SEO readiness.

Use AI to write SEO-optimised service pages to support content marketing efforts using SOPs.





Requirements

Proven experience designing websites in WordPress and Go High Level at another agency (at least 5-7 years+).

Strong sense of design and understanding of UI/UX for conversions.

Proficiency with Elementor (or similar page builders).

Working knowledge of SEO fundamentals (title tags, alt tags, schema basics).

Experience with mobile optimisation, speed performance, and user-friendly layouts.

Understanding of marketing funnels and user journeys.

Strong communication and ability to work to deadlines.

Strong knowledge of branding and webdesign systems.

Familiarity with CRO (Conversion Rate Optimisation) best practices.

Experience with schema markup, page speed tools, and analytics.

Strong experience setting up lead generation campaigns and using Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Google Tag Manager, Google Ads Manager Etc. 



Preferred Skills

Ability to write clear, engaging SEO articles (preferred but not required)

Comfort managing multiple web and content projects at once.

Ability to use a Miro board to map out funnel designs



Compensation

Hourly rate: USD $10/hr depending on experience. Parttime and fulltime available.

Long-term growth opportunities with increasing responsibilities.



Why Join Us

Be part of an up-and-coming agency that is growing quickly.

Get access to and learn the latest AI agent tools so you don't get left behind.

Work Australian hours (only 3 hour timezone difference with the Philippines).



How to Apply

Apply with your resume, cover letter and portfolio of websites. In the subject line include: "Webdeveloper role application". If you don't do these your application will not be assessed. Include a short video explaining why you'd be a good fit for the role. You must have at least 5 years experience working in another agency working on websites and leadgeneration. Applications without strong agency experience will not be considered. We are looking for someone experienced and proactive, attention to detail oriented and able to take on tasks with minimal instruction. We will provide training on new AI related platforms like AI Agents (claude, manus, gemini), but minimal on tasks outlined in the description (we will provide our SOPs but you will be expected to perform with minimal supervision).

We are not looking for a normal video editor.

, Instagram, TikTok and Youtube ads.

3. Improving ads based on performance feedback

4. Adding subtitles, motion graphics, product callouts, transition effects and strong pacing

You may be a fit if:

1. You have experience editing paid social ads

2. You understand what makes an ad convert, not just look nice

3. You can think like a performance marketer, not just an editor

4. You move fast, take feedback well, and enjoy testing creative ideas



Experience with AI tools is a plus but not required



Apply here:

title: Video Editor Wanted — Direct Response Ads for Teeth Whitening Brand
description:
We run paid ads for a teeth whitening brand and we need a video editor who actually understands direct response.



Not someone who makes videos look pretty. Someone who understands that the first 3 seconds either hooks or dies, that the edit exists to sell, and that every cut, caption, and transition has a job to do.

Short-form paid ad creatives (Meta/TikTok/Reels)

Direct response UGC-style ads

AI Animation using nano banana and kling 3.0

AI-assisted animation clips (we'll train you on this if needed)

You've edited ads before — not just content, actual paid ads

You understand hooks, pacing, and why pattern interrupts matter

You can take a brief and execute without hand-holding

Fast turnaround — we move quickly and need someone who matches that energy

Portfolio that includes at least 1–2 DR/eCommerce ads (required)

A creative director role

A "make it look cinematic" role

For someone who needs 5 revisions to get a simple edit right



Engagement: Per video or monthly contractor depending on output volume

Rate:

$500–$1,000/month base (depending on experience and speed)

$200 bonus for every winning ad concept — if your edit gets scaled, you get paid for it



UNLIMITED BONUS STRUCTURE. IF YOU DELIVER WINNING AD CONCEPTS, YOU CAN MAKE 3K - 5K+ USD PER MONTH with potential to move higher in the business.

title: Virtual Assistant – Full Training Provided
description:
!!!Applications that do not include all required items in the “How to Apply” section will not be reviewed. We value attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions—key traits for this role. If any part of this application is incomplete or missing, your submission will be automatically disregarded.?



About us:



Majestix Collection is a premier destination for buying, selling, and trading luxury timepieces. We curate an exceptional selection of watches for collectors around the world, driven by a commitment to authenticity, transparency, and unparalleled client service.



We are a growing company looking for a Virtual Assistant who is eager to grow, takes ownership, and follows instructions carefully. We provide full training on:



Sales and marketing

Customer service and admin tasks

Product listings and e-commerce support

Photo and video editing

Automation tools (including n8n,pabbly and zapier)

SEO and copywriting

Other business operations as needed



Role Overview



You will support the team with day to day tasks, help improve processes, and learn new tools and skills as the company grows. This is a remote role with long term growth potential for the right person.



Qualifications:



Exceptional attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

Proficiency in data management, including advanced skills in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Basic graphic design skills using Canva.

Eager to learn and adapt to new tools and strategies.

Knowledge of understanding processes, documentation of process, documentation of errors in process and propose solutions for errors in process

at least an Intel i5 (7th generation or above) or an AMD Ryzen 5 (2nd generation or above).

/message, briefly share:

title: Graphic Designer (High-Volume Production – Posters & Wall Art)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

We are looking for a high-output Graphic Designer (Production Designer) to join our growing wall art brand (Wallbuddy Ltd), selling on Etsy, Amazon, and wholesale globally.

This role is focused on scaling designs, not creating from scratch.

You will work under our Creative Director to take proven design styles and roll them out across hundreds of variations (e.g. cities, landmarks, maps, etc.).



???? IMPORTANT:

To be considered, you MUST:

Submit a portfolio of poster or layout design work

Include “WALLBUDDY DESIGN” in your subject line

Use 5 APPLY POINTS in your application

Applications without these will not be reviewed.



YOUR ROLE (VERY IMPORTANT TO UNDERSTAND)

This is not a typical “creative designer” role.

You will:

Take approved design templates

Adapt them into multiple variations (e.g. 100+ cities, landmarks, etc.)

Work quickly and consistently within a defined style

???? Think: high-quality repetition at scale



DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES

Create 20+ poster designs per day using existing templates

Adapt designs across different themes (cities, landmarks, maps, etc.)

Restore and enhance vintage artwork (e.g. old posters, adverts, illustrations) by cleaning, sharpening, upscaling, and preparing high-resolution print files

Follow strict layout, typography, and branding guidelines

Work closely with our Creative Director and team

Send a short daily progress update



REQUIRED SKILLS

Minimum 2 years graphic design experience

Strong Photoshop and/or Illustrator skills (essential)

Excellent attention to detail and layout consistency

Ability to follow design systems and templates precisely

Fast turnaround and ability to hit daily targets



ADDITIONAL SKILL (HIGHLY VALUED)

Experience restoring vintage or old artwork

Ability to clean, sharpen, and upscale low-resolution images

Experience using tools such as Photoshop, Topaz Gigapixel, or similar

Strong attention to detail when preparing files for high-quality printing



BONUS (NOT REQUIRED BUT A PLUS)

Experience with poster or print design

Experience creating product mockups

Familiarity with AI tools (Midjourney, DALL·E, etc.)

Experience working in high-volume design roles

title: Web Design & Development
description:
We’re looking for a Web Designer & Developer who builds websites that perform, not just websites that look good. You will own the full web build process, from initial design concepts through development, launch, and ongoing optimization — for Bluestage clients across multiple industries.

 

This role sits at the intersection of design and engineering. You need to be comfortable opening a design tool and opening a code editor in the same afternoon. You’ll work closely with the CRM and marketing teams to ensure every site we ship is connected to lead capture systems, tracking, and automation from day one.



Design

• Design original, conversion-focused websites and landing pages for Bluestage clients

• Create wireframes, mockups, and prototypes using Figma or similar tools

• Develop and maintain brand-consistent design systems for each client

• Design mobile-first layouts optimized for user experience and lead generation

• Produce graphic assets including banners, social templates, and
 headers as needed

 

Development

• Build and launch websites on WordPress, with proficiency in Elementor, Divi, or custom theme development

• Write clean, well-structured HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

• Integrate websites with GoHighLevel (BluestageAI), Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager, and Meta Pixel

• Set up and optimize contact forms, lead capture pages, and funnel integrations

• Implement on-page SEO best practices including page speed, structured data, and technical SEO foundations

• Manage website hosting, domain configuration, SSL, and ongoing maintenance across client accounts

title: Social Media Assistant
description:
About the Role:



We’re hiring an Engagement Strategist to act as the voice and connector for the personal brands we manage.

This role is not about posting content.

It’s about starting conversations.

You will engage on behalf of our clients inside comments, replies, and DMs to build relationships, create familiarity, and naturally guide conversations toward a next step when appropriate.



Core Responsibilities:



Social Media Engagement & Relationship Building

– Engage on other people’s content to spark natural conversations

– Respond to comments, replies, and DMs in each client’s brand voice

– Ask thoughtful follow-up questions to keep conversations moving

– Recognize when to transition a conversation toward connection or booking

– Maintain professionalism, warmth, and clarity in all written communication



Story & Light Content Support

– Assist with Instagram Stories (text, polls, replies, short clips)

– Repurpose approved content across platforms when needed



Tracking & Admin

– Track daily engagement activity (comments, DMs, conversations started)

– Monitor response quality and engagement patterns

– Assist with light content scrubbing for short video clips



Required Skills & Traits

– Excellent written English (grammar, tone, vocabulary, clarity are non-negotiable)

– Strong conversational instincts and emotional intelligence

– Familiarity with Instagram and LinkedIn (comments, DMs, Stories, basic analytics)

– Ability to sound human and brand-aligned, never scripted or robotic

– Organized, self-directed, and comfortable with feedback



Working Hours:

This role has set engagement windows:

– 4:00am–7:00am PST

– 3:00pm–6:00pm PST

– Monday through Thursday minimum

Occasional brief admin tasks may occur outside these windows.



To Apply:

Step 1: Loom Video (Required)

Please record a 5–7 minute Loom answering the prompts below. We’re looking for how you think, speak, and write, not perfection.

1. Instagram Experience

How do you personally use Instagram day to day, and what features do you use most (comments, DMs, Stories, etc.)?

2. Starting Conversations

If you were networking on behalf of a client, how would you leave comments that feel natural and start real conversations?

3. Guiding Toward a Next Step

How would you naturally move a conversation from casual engagement to a potential call or appointment without sounding salesy?

4. Tone & Voice

How do you adjust your language when speaking on behalf of someone else’s brand?



Step 2: Written Questions (After Loom Review)

If your Loom is a fit, we’ll ask you to answer the questions below:

Q1: On a scale of 1–10, how confident are you using Instagram’s tools (comments, DMs, Stories, analytics)? Why?

Q2: Share an example of an online interaction that turned into a real relationship, opportunity, or next step.

Q3: How do you d
 when to keep a conversation casual versus when to guide it toward a next step?

Q4: How do you ensure your written English stays clear, professional, and aligned with someone else’s voice?

Q5: Are you open to a short paid test project (1 hour or less) to demonstrate engagement and comment strategy?



Step 3: Test Project

Selected candidates will receive a short paid engagement exercise using real examples so we can evaluate comment quality, DM tone, conversation flow, and judgment.
