title: TikTok Shop Growth Lead (Affiliate + Performance + Systems)
description:
Overview



We’re looking for someone to take ownership of building and scaling our TikTok Shop channel across both internal brands and client accounts.



This is not a task-based role. This role is responsible for driving growth, building systems, and managing execution.



You will be expected to take initiative, make decisions, and create structure where it does not yet exist.



-------------------------------------------



Core Responsibilities



• Build and scale TikTok Shop affiliate programs from the ground up

• Develop outreach systems, follow-up pipelines, and creator qualification processes

• Manage TikTok Shop Seller Center (listings, shop health, performance)

• Identify high-performing creators and scale them

• Improve conversion rates, not just traffic

• Track and report on key metrics (GMV, CPO, affiliate contribution, conversion rate)

• Implement systems for tracking, reporting, and execution (ClickUp, Notion, or similar)

• Manage and delegate tasks to support tea
mbers as we scale

• Plan, launch, and optimize TikTok Shop Ads campaigns, including GMV Max or similar campaign types



-------------------------------------------



Requirements



• Prior experience working within an agency or managing multiple client accounts simultaneously

• Proven ability to onboard and manage multiple TikTok Shop accounts across different brands

• Experience handling access, permissions, and account structure across multiple sellers

• Comfortable managing multiple projects at once with clear organization and prioritization

• Experience working within a team structure and delegating to support roles

• Experience building or scaling affiliate or creator programs

• Hands-on experience running TikTok Ads, including TikTok Shop Ads

• Hands-on experience optimizing TikTok Shop Ads frameworks, including GMV Max or similar campaign types

• Strong understanding of performance metrics (ROAS, CPA, CPO, conversion rate)

• Strong decision-making and prioritization skills

• Ability to create systems and processes, not just follow them

• Highly organized and structured in how you manage work



-------------------------------------------



Do Not Apply If



• You have only worked on a single brand or single TikTok Shop account

• You have not managed multiple accounts or clients at the same time

• You do not have experience organizing work across multiple projects or timelines

• You are not familiar with managing account access, onboarding, and permissions across different clients

• You only have virtual assistant or task-based experience

• You rely on step-by-step instructions to complete work

• You have not owned performance or results (sales, GMV, conversions)

• You have only done influencer outreach without tracking outcomes

• You do not have hands-on experience running TikTok Ads

• You do not have hands-on experience with TikTok Shop Ads optimization frameworks, including GMV Max or similar campaign types



-------------------------------------------



Nice to Have (Not Required)



• Amazon Creator / Influencer program experience

• Shopify affiliate systems

• Experience managing or leading a team



-------------------------------------------



Compensation



• 2-week paid trial period

• Starting rate: $8/hour (based on experience)

• Opportunity to grow into a long-term leadership role as we scale



-------------------------------------------



Application Instructions



To be considered, include the following:



1. Describe a creator or affiliate system you built

2. How many creators you managed at one time

3. What metrics you tracked and improved

4. What tools you used to manage the process

5. Describe how many client or brand accounts you managed at the same time and how you stayed organized

6. Describe your experience running TikTok Ads, including TikTok Shop Ads

7. Describe your experience using TikTok Shop Ads optimization frameworks, including GMV Max or similar campaign types, and how you used them to scale performance



Applications without this information will not be considered.

title: ** Short-Form Video Editor ** (Ad Creatives & Founder Storytelling)
description:
INTRO:

Are you a creative, detail-oriented editor with a passion for visual storytelling and conversion-driven ads? Do you enjoy the challenge of translating a brand's vision into captivating short-form video content?



I’m Rico, the founder of Lampiece, where we create unique, personalized lamps. My brand is built on authenticity, a personal touch, and the journey of building a business. I am looking for a reliable, intermediate-to-advanced Video Editor to help me scale our content.



Currently, we need 1 Social Media Video and 1 Video Ad Creative per week, with the goal of increasing this output gradually as we grow.



Example of the style we're going for:

- 



WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON:

You will receive detailed editing briefs and raw footage to create two distinct types of content:

- Social Media Videos (Storytelling): Founder-led content focusing on my business journey. This requires an authentic, engaging storytelling style.

- Ad Creatives (Conversion-Driven): Direct-response ads using various formats like UGC, mashups, and founder ads.



Note on Language: The final output for all videos will be in both English and Dutch. Don't worry if you don't speak Dutch! You will be provided with clear English instructions and detailed briefs making it very easy to create the Dutch versions (including matching the subtitles).



OUR PERFECT MATCH HAS:

- 2+ years of experience editing either social media videos or ad creatives (experience in both is a major plus!).

- Intermediate to advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects (No CapCut).

- Strong skills in making engaging basic cuts, adding dynamic subtitles, and integrating simple motion graphics.

- A keen eye for pacing, visual aesthetics, and social media platform specifications (TikTok, Instagram Reels, Shorts).

- A proactive attitude and the ability to follow a detailed creative brief.



COMPENSATION:

This is a freelance role, and you will be paid on a per-video basis. As the brand grows, your weekly volume and earning potential will grow with it.



HOW TO APPLY:

To ensure you have read this entire post, please include the word "LAMP" at the very beginning of your application subject line or message. Please send us:

- Your resume

- A link to your portfolio specifically showcasing your short-form video editing skills (please point out which are ads and which are organic social media videos).

- Bonus points: Include a brief proposal on how you'd capture our brand's authenticity and unique charm in video form.

title: PROJECT MANAGER · AI & TECH OPERATOR · MARKETING STRATEGIST
description:
WE’RE HIRING: PROJECT MANAGER · AI & TECH OPERATOR · MARKETING STRATEGIST

Full-Time | Remote | The Digital Era



This is not a job ad for everyone.

It’s for the 1% operator who knows they’re built for more.



The Digital Era is expanding fast and we’re stepping into our next level of scale.

We’re looking for someone who doesn’t just keep up with AI and tech…

but is obsessed with where it’s going.



Someone who can think, build, optimise, and lead.

Someone who wants to be in the room where things are actually happening. 

_______________________



THE ROLE

You’ll step into a high-impact position working directly with the founders to help drive the next phase of growth across our global education platform.



You will:

• Own and manage multiple high-level projects delivered monthly to our members

• Design and implement AI-driven systems, workflows, and automations across the business

• Work alongside developers to execute and evolve our tech infrastructure

• Build, support, and optimise marketing campaigns, funnels, and launches

• Integrate tools like ChatGPT and Claude to create high-performing campaign assets and systems

• Continuously improve productivity, operations, and scalability using AI

• Play a key role in how we grow and expand over the next 12–24 months



This is where strategy meets execution.

You won’t just manage projects… you’ll help build the machine. 

_______________________



WHO YOU ARE

• You’re switched on, fast, and naturally resourceful

• You’re deeply immersed in AI, automation, and emerging tech

• You don’t wait for instructions… you see gaps and move

• You can hold multiple moving parts without dropping standards

• You understand how marketing actually works, not just theory

• You care about building something meaningful, not just ticking boxes



You don’t need to know everything.

But you must be someone who figures things out fast.

_______________________ 



SKILLSET & EXPERIENCE

• Proven ability to manage multiple projects and timelines

• Strong working knowledge of AI tools, workflows, and productivity systems

• Experience using ChatGPT, Claude, and similar tools to build campaigns, assets, and systems

• Solid understanding of digital marketing, funnels, and launches highly desirable

• Experience in online education, digital products, or communities is a bonus

• Clear communication, strong decision making, and ownership mentality

_______________________ 



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT

• You’ll be at the forefront of AI implementation in a rapidly scaling company

• You’ll work directly with founders building at a high level

• You’ll have real ownership, not micromanagement

• You’ll be part of shaping the future of The Digital Era

• You’ll grow fast because the environment demands it



This is a builder’s role.

Not a spectator’s seat.

_______________________ 



THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF

• You need constant direction or hand-holding

• You avoid responsibility or decision making

• You’re not actively engaged in AI and tech evolution

• You want something comfortable, predictable, or slow

_______________________ 



PACKAGE

• Starting at $40,000 AUD salary per year

• With clear opportunity for growth, expansion, and increased compensation based on experience, performance and results over first 12 months

_______________________  



HOW TO APPLY



Send us:

1. A short video introducing who you are and why you’re a fit

2. Your experience with AI, systems, productivity, and marketing

3. Why this role excites you

4. Your CV with references

5. Apply here: 



If you’re reading this and feel like this was written for you… it probably was.
salary: Starting at $40,000 AUD salary per year

- Great for anyone who wants a low-effort side gig

- Reliable/consistent (uptime matters)



? Please do NOT apply if:

- Your phone is only online a few hours/day

- You only use iPhone/iPad



? If you can keep your phone online 20–24h/day consistently, you’ll do well here.

title: Sales Operations Coordinator — Proposal & Estimating Assistant (Construction)
description:
We are a top-producing painting and stucco sales operation in Arizona 

generating $3M+ annually. We are building a lean sales machine and need 

a dedicated, long-term coordinator to run the back end while our manager 

stays in the field closing deals.



YOUR DAILY TASKS:

- Transcribe voice memos from job site visits into structured scope outlines

- Draft proposal descriptions, scope of work, and excludes lists using AI tools

- Enter job data into a CRM (job info, site address, client details, photos)

- Maintain our Google Sheets pipeline tracker — update statuses daily

- Draft and queue Day 2 / Day 5 / Day 10 follow-up
s for manager review

- Confirm appointments and help batch site visits geographically

- Research properties using Maricopa County Assessor public records

- Send manager a daily end-of-day status update



YOU DO NOT: set pricing, call clients directly, or send anything without review.



REQUIREMENTS:

- College graduate (engineering or construction background preferred)

- Excellent written English — proposals must read as professional and native

- Available Arizona time (MST) — 8am to 5pm

- Proficient in Google Workspace and comfortable using ChatGPT or Claude AI

- Seeking one dedicated long-term employer — not multiple clients

- Fast stable internet (20+ Mbps)



TO APPLY — YOU MUST COMPLETE THIS TEST TASK:

Here are notes from a site visit: "2-story commercial exterior. Full repaint. 

Heavy stucco cracking south and west sides of building — 60 LF medium crack repair. 

Iron entry gate and 3 railings — full prep, prime, repaint black. Power wash 

everything. 2 coats exterior paint, body and trim separate colors. 

Light poles, Trash enclosure, Doors, Door frames, Window mullions are excluded."



Provide: 1) A scope of work outline ready to paste into a proposal. 

2) A standard excludes list. 3) A short professional proposal
.

Return within 24 hours. Applications without the test task will not be reviewed.

title: Affiliate Entrepreneur - Earn 25% Commissions by promoting DTC brand (Previously US-Only, Now Open Globally)
description:
Affiliate Marketing Position - Earn 25%-30% Commissions in a Booming Market



We're looking for driven, entrepreneurial individuals to join our affiliate program - previously exclusive to US-based partners, now open to international talent for the first time.

You can earn $1,000–$5,000+/month building your own income stream with established e-commerce brands.

This isn't a typical VA role. You'll be building something for yourself while helping scale real brands. And the best part? We have a server built with all the resources and information needed to succeed. You won’t be doing this alone.



How It Works: 3 Levels:

Level 1: Affiliate (Entry)



No retainer — pure commission

25% commission on all sales you generate

Prove yourself here first. Show us you can move product and you level up.



Level 2: Senior Affiliate (Proven Performers)

title: Accountant (Non-CPA)
description:
We are seeking a dedicated Accountant (non?CPA) to join our organisation under an exclusive arrangement. Please note that this position is not open to freelancers, contractors, or companies.

Requirements

Main Duties

 • Payroll / Pension

Responsibilities

Working Hours

Benefits

Compensation

 • 13th month bonus

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
***THIS ROLE REQUIRES PREVIOUS VIRTUAL ASSISTANT EXPERIENCE WITH TRADE-RELATED SERVICE COMPANIES (HVAC, ROOFING, SOLAR, PLUMBING, ELECTRICAL, OR CONSTRUCTION)***



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS:



If you would like to be considered for this role, please complete the following steps:



   1. Use “VIRTUAL” as the subject line of your application.

   2. Include a brief cover letter outlining your relevant experience.

   3. Provide a link to your CV/Resume.



Please note: Applications submitted without a CV/Resume will not be reviewed.



About the Role:

We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to assist our HVAC office managers based in the United States. In this role, you will provide administrative and operational support to help keep day-to-day office processes running smoothly.



You’ll work closely with our team to handle documentation, process paperwork, and assist with customer-related tasks so our office managers can focus on higher-level business operations. If you enjoy structured work, staying organized, and supporting growing service businesses, this could be a great fit for you.



Key Responsibilities:

• Prepare and process invoices for HVAC services, repairs, and equipment

• Submit equipment warranty registrations for completed installations

• Prepare and file rebate documentation for energy-efficient HVAC systems

• Assist with creating and scheduling social media posts for HVAC businesses

• Provide administrative support to office managers

• Maintain accurate digital records and documentation

• Follow established processes to ensure tasks are completed correctly

• Communicate with tea
mbers to keep workflows organized and on track

• Provide occasional support with customer service tasks when needed



Requirements:

• Strong English communication skills: spoken and written (REQUIRED)

• Previous experience working as a Virtual Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or Process Support Specialist (REQUIRED)

• Experience supporting trade-related businesses such as HVAC, plumbing, solar, electrical, roofing, or similar industries (REQUIRED)

• Experience handling permits, rebates, or documentation for service businesses (PREFERRED)

• Familiarity with creating professional social media content

• Comfortable using common office software and online tools

• Tech-savvy and able to quickly learn new systems

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks while meeting deadlines

• Positive attitude and willingness to support growing businesses



Work Schedule:

• 8 hours per day, 5 days per week

title: AI CRM Systems Architect (GoHighLevel + MCP + Automation)
description:
We are looking for a high-level systems architect to build and deploy an AI-powered CRM operating system inside GoHighLevel using MCP (Model Context Protocol), automation workflows, and structured pipeline logic.



This is NOT a basic funnel-building role. We are building a multi-agent AI system that will manage lead qualification, nurturing, pipeline movement, and internal operations.



You must understand both:

- GoHighLevel deeply

- AI-driven automation systems (MCP, agents, structured prompts)



---



Scope of Work:



- Set up and configure MCP integration within GoHighLevel

- Architect and deploy 2 AI agents:

  - Pepper (sales, qualification, pipeline control)

  - Legacy (education, nurture, reactivation)

- Build structured workflows with clean trigger logic

- Design pipeline stages, tagging systems, and contact segmentation

- Implement AI guardrails (allowed actions, escalation rules, compliance)

- Connect AI agents to CRM actions (tasks, notes, stage movement, messaging)

- Create knowledge base / prompt systems for agent behavior

- Test all automations and ensure system reliability

- Train internal team on how to control, adjust, and scale the system



---



Requirements:



- Proven experience with GoHighLevel (workflows, pipelines, automation)

- Experience working with AI integrations (OpenAI, agents, or MCP-like systems)

- Strong understanding of CRM architecture and data flow

- Ability to think in systems, not just tools

- Experience building scalable automation (not just one-off workflows)

- Clear communication and ability to train non-technical operators



---



Bonus (Strong Advantage):

- Experience with MCP or similar AI-agent frameworks

- Experience in sales automation, lead qualification systems, or high-ticket funnels

- Experience with webhook/API integrations



---



Deliverables:



- Fully functioning AI-powered CRM system

- Clean and documented workflows

- Agent prompt and control structure

- Training session + walkthrough documentation

- Ongoing optimization recommendations



---



Important:



This role requires strategic thinking, not just execution.  

We are building an AI-operated CRM, not basic automations.



Please include:

1. Examples of similar systems you've built

2. Your approach to AI + CRM integration

3. How you would structure agent-based workflows



Salary will be discussed during the interview.

title: WEB DESIGNER & DEVELOPER
description:
Australian Agency | Full-Time Remote | Long-Term | Above-Market Pay



A growing Melbourne digital marketing agency is hiring a full-time Web Designer & Developer to join the team remotely from the Philippines. This is a design-led role: you meet clients, run requirements, design the work in Figma, then build and ship it. We are hiring for visual judgement first and build capability second.



If you are a brilliant coder who lives on page-builder templates and relies on someone else for the look and feel — this role is not for you.



This is a long-term, stable position with a clear path to grow as the agency expands its web capability.





WHAT YOU WILL DO — END TO END



• Sit in on client discovery calls; run requirements and scoping conversations directly with the client

• Translate the brief into wireframes and full page designs in Figma (or Moqups / Adobe XD) — hero, sections, CTAs, responsive layouts

• Present design concepts to clients and iterate based on feedback

• Prepare technical briefs and quotation-grade scopes for client sign-off

• Build the approved design as a custom WordPress site — bespoke themes, plugins, and functionality (not page-builder template work)

• Where required, build modern React applications (Next JS / Gatsby JS) and integrate with headless / decoupled CMS back-ends

• Deploy via Netlify and manage versioning through Git/GitHub

• Coordinate with copy, SEO, and project teams via Slack and Zoho Projects





WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU



Design (this is the priority)

• A genuine eye for design — clean layouts, confident typography, visual hierarchy, restraint

• Strong Figma (or other design software) skills — wireframing, component design, responsive layouts, prototyping

• A portfolio that shows original design work, not just implementations of  someone else's mockups

• The ability to take a rough client brief and turn it into a designed page



Build

• 3+ years hands-on web development, ideally in an agency environment

• Strong custom WordPress (themes, plugins, hooks — beyond Elementor)

• Solid HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — clean, responsive, accessible

• Confident with Git/GitHub and Netlify (or similar) deployments

• Able to implement your own Figma designs faithfully in code



Client delivery

• Confident in client-facing conversations — discovery, scoping, feedback

• Strong written English for briefs, scopes, and proposals

• Self-motivated, organised, able to own a project end-to-end

• Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace



Nice to have: React JS / Next JS, headless CMS experience, UI/UX thinking, prototyping, brand and graphic design crossover, AI-assisted dev tools (Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code), PHP depth, web performance work, on-page SEO awareness. Bonuses, not requirements.





WHO YOU ARE

• A designer at heart who also ships working sites

• Visually literate — you notice spacing, kerning, contrast, rhythm

• Comfortable in front of a client, explaining design decisions

• Detail-focused — pixel-perfect between design and build, no sloppy handovers

• A clear communicator who translates business goals into web solutions

• Curious — you follow design trends, tooling, and AI design/dev workflows

• Growth-minded — you want to deepen your craft and take on more responsibility





WORK ENVIRONMENT

• Full-time remote, Monday to Friday

• Work hours aligned to Melbourne, Australia business hours

• Communication by Slack,
, and video

• Direct interaction with the agency director, clients, and project team

• Working across multiple client projects in parallel

• Sole employment — this is not a side gig





WHAT WE OFFER

• Above-market pay for the right person (negotiable, based on experience)

• Long-term, stable full-time role with a growing agency

• A clear path to grow as the web team expands

• Exposure to a varied portfolio across multiple industries

• A supportive team that values craft, initiative, and results





HOW TO APPLY



Apply through our application form here:





The form will ask you to upload your resume AND your design portfolio, share a project example, and answer a few quick questions about your design process, experience, and work setup.



Your portfolio is essential. Applications without visual design samples will not be progressed. Applications sent any other way will not be reviewed.

title: Amazon Manager
description:
Amazon & Ecommerce Manager — MySweetSmile (Remote, Full-Time)



ABOUT US



MySweetSmile is an award-winning teeth whitening and oral care brand with over 1,000,000 customers globally. We're the UK's #1 teeth whitening brand (The Independent, 2023 & 2024), sold across Amazon UK, US, and EU, Shopify, TikTok Shop, and multiple retail marketplaces. We're growing fast and need someone to own our marketplace operations full-time.



THE ROLE



You'll be the person who lives inside our Amazon accounts and marketplace platforms every single day. Your job is to ensure every listing, every market, and every backend detail is optimised, accurate, and up to date — so the founder doesn't have to.

This is not a VA role. This is full ownership of marketplace operations across multiple platforms and countries.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Amazon (Primary — 50% of role)

- Listing management across UK, US, DE, FR, ES, IT, NL, SE, PL — titles, bullet points, descriptions, backend keywords, search terms, product categories

- A+ Content creation, Brand Story updates, and image gallery management

- Flat file uploads and feed file management

- Listing experiments (A/B testing titles, images, bullets)

- Promotions setup and management (coupons, deals, Brand Tailored Promotions)

- Backend compliance: ingredients, directions for use, safety warnings, category accuracy

- Translations and localisation for EU marketplaces (using AI tools is expected)

- Keeping all marketplaces aligned to a universal standard set by the founder



New Product Launches & Marketplace Expansion (15% of role)

- End-to-end listing creation for new MySweetSmile products across all active marketplaces — content, A+ pages, compliance, and go-live readiness

- Facilitating new marketplace launches as we expand into UAE, Saudi Arabia, Japan, Singapore, and beyond — account setup, listing creation, marketplace-specific requirements, and ensuring all content meets local standards

- Working with the founder and operations team to coordinate launch timelines



Other Marketplaces (10% of role)

- TikTok Shop listing & store management

- Superdrug, Debenhams, OnBuy, and other retail marketplace listings

- Ensuring product data, imagery, and pricing is consistent across all channels



Inventory & Stock Coordination (10% of role)

- Monitoring FBA stock levels daily across all marketplaces

- Flagging restock requirements to the operations team before stockouts occur

- Coordinating on inbound shipment timelines and inventory planning

- Tracking stock positions across non-Amazon channels



Reporting & Competitor Monitoring (10% of role)

- Weekly marketplace performance report summarising sales, stock levels, and key metrics across all channels

- Reviewing advertising agency performance and flagging concerns to the founder

- Weekly competitor monitoring — tracking pricing, listing changes, and new product activity in our category



Creative & Design (5% of role)

- A+ Content design and image gallery creation in Canva

- Updating lifestyle and product imagery across listings

- Graphic design for marketplace-specific assets



WHAT YOU MUST HAVE — NON-NEGOTIABLE



If you don't have all of the following, this role is not for you.



- 3+ years of hands-on Amazon Seller Central experience — you know flat files, backend fields, feed management, and catalogue operations inside out. Not just UI editing.

- Experience managing listings across at least 5 Amazon marketplaces

- Experience launching products on new Amazon marketplaces (especially UAE, JP, SA, SG, AU)

- Confident with A+ Content, Brand Registry, and Brand Story creation

- Confident with Canva or similar design tools for A+ content, image galleries, and basic graphic design

- Experience with TikTok Shop or other non-Amazon marketplace platforms

- Experience with Shopify (product page updates, imagery, descriptions, pricing)

- Experience with Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or similar Amazon tools

- Basic understanding of Amazon PPC — enough to review an agency's performance, flag issues, and ask the right questions

- Experience with European marketplace translations and localisation

- Experience using AI tools (Claude, etc.) for copywriting, translations, and productivity — this is how we work and you'll be expected to use them daily

- Amazon compliance knowledge: ingredients, origin documentation, safety warnings, category requirements

- Strong written English

- Self-starter who takes full ownership and doesn't wait to be told what to do

- Detail-obsessed — you spot a wrong bullet point, a missing keyword, or an incorrect category and it bothers you



TOOLS WE USE

-Amazon Seller Central (global), Canva, Shopify, Notion, Slack, Google Sheets, Google Drive, Helium 10, AI tools (Claude)



SCHEDULE



Flexible within UK business hours overlap. We need at least 4–5 hours of crossover with UK time (GMT/BST) daily. Full-time, 45 hours per week, 5 days (2 fixed days off).



COMPENSATION



Depending on experience. Long-term role with room to grow as the brand scales into new markets and product lines.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:



- You only know basic VA-level Amazon tasks

- You've never worked with flat files or feed management

- You don't have marketplace expansion experience

- You can't design A+ content or work in Canva

- You need hand-holding or frequent check-ins

- You've never used AI tools for productivity

- You can't work independently across time zones

- You want a regular 9-5. 



HOW TO APPLY



Title your application: "MSS Amazon & Ecommerce Manager — [Your Name]"



Include:

- A short intro (3–4 sentences) on why you're the right fit

- A link to a Google Sheet or Doc showing your Amazon marketplace experience — specifically which marketplaces you've managed, what tasks you handled, and any results you achieved

- One example of A+ Content or an Amazon listing you've optimised (screenshot or link)



Applications that don't follow these specific steps will not be reviewed.

title: Creative Strategist & Content Producer
description:
About the company

At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health & improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain & discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain & distress others have to endure.

Job description

We're looking for a Creative Strategist & Content Producer to shape how our health & pharmaceutical brands communicate across both digital & offline channels. You'll craft effective strategies that translate scientific credibility into compelling storytelling & creative assets - helping us engage our diverse audience as we expand our presence regionally. 



The Creative Strategist & Content Producer will be the visionary link between our brand identity, compelling content creation & drive measurable performance across all key channels. This role is responsible for developing & testing high-impact creative strategies as well as producing content assets (visual, video, copy) internally, specifically designed to drive traffic, increase conversion rates, lower Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) & drive overall revenue growth for our Shopify, Shopee & Lazada stores via social media as well as paid advertising platforms.



You'll work across multiple channels & markets to plan, create & optimize content that builds awareness, strengthens partnerships & supports the new channels of the business. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys balancing creativity, analytics & brand strategy in the health supplement industry. 



Key Responsibilities:

Creative Strategy

- Platform & Channel Strategy: Craft tailored creative strategies for B2C & B2B audiences optimized for platform-specific best practices & formats that align with brand goals & regulatory requirements in each market (e.g., Meta carousel ads, vertical video for TikTok/Reels, static product carousels for Shopee/Lazada e-commerce banner ads).

- Hypothesis Generation & A/B Testing: Develop robust creative testing matrices, formulate clear hypotheses for creative elements (hooks, calls-to-action, visual styles, copy length) that drive measurable improvements in Click-Through Rate (CTR) & Conversion Rate (CVR).

- Audience Segmentation: Translate target audience data & segmentation provided by media buyers into resonant creative themes, ensuring content speaks directly to different stages of the marketing funnel (awareness, consideration, conversion).

- Competitive Analysis: Continuously keep up to date with competitors & industry trends, identifying new & successful creative formats, hooks & messaging to finetune our strategy.

In-House Content Production & Execution 

- Performance Creative Development: Lead the end-to-end creative concept development & production for all organic & paid media campaigns (Meta, TikTok, Google/YouTube, etc.) that align with brand & campaign goals, focusing on high-volume, quick-turnaround testing required for performance marketing.

- Hands-on Asset Creation: Directly produce & edit native social content & performance ads using existing assets, stock libraries & internal resources. This includes:

i. Plan platform-specific content calendars: Cover educational, promotional & corporate communications

ii. Static/Image Editing: Adapt product photography, create ad variations & design simple graphics & banner ads

iii. Video Editing: Fast-paced assembly, cutting, adding text overlays, music & effects for short-form, vertical video (UGC-style, product demos, testimonials)

- Copywriting: Develop high-converting ad copy, landing page headlines & social media captions that align with the creative strategy & brand voice, with a focus on clear value propositions & strong CTAs.

- Asset Management: Ensure all campaign assets are correctly tagged, archived & deployed across relevant channels (Shopify, Shopee, Lazada store fronts & advertising platforms).

- Testing & Optimization: apply insights & analytics to refine & optimize content effectiveness across platforms.

Performance & Reporting

- Data-Driven Insights: Work closely with the Marketing Manager to analyze creative performance reports, identifying which creative variables are driving results (or failing) across Shopify, Shopee & Lazada traffic.

- Iteration & Optimization: 

i. Develop, adapt or review content & formats to improve engagement & performance

ii. Use performance data (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CVR) to rapidly iterate on existing creative assets & inform future strategy, ensuring a continuous cycle of improvement & optimization

Storefront Integration: Integrate winning creative messages & visuals onto the respective e-commerce storefronts (product pages, banners) to ensure a cohesive customer journey.

Multi-Channel Storytelling

- Content cohesion: Ensure content is aligned where possible across digital & print media, including LinkedIn, Instagram,
, YouTube, e-commerce platforms, brochures & trade materials.

- Tailor content: To achieve relevance & effectiveness across different stages of the audience journey — from brand awareness & education to conversion.

- Storytelling & visual consistency: To strengthen brand trust & recognition.

Compliance & Brand Integrity

- Uphold regulatory & ethical communication standards across all marketing activities.

- Ensure all content complies with regulatory guidelines & marketing requirements in each country we operate in, including product claims, advertising language & digital promotions.

- Maintain brand credibility by ensuring all communications are factual & aligned with company values.

- Collaborate with internal teams to review materials for accuracy, effectiveness & compliance before publication.



Requirements:

- 3–5 years of experience in creative strategy, content creation, social media, or brand marketing — ideally in health supplements, healthcare or wellness.

- Strong understanding of social media trends & platform best practices (Meta (FB/IG), LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Generative AI).

- Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools.

- Excellent writing, editing & visual storytelling skills — adopt a strategic approach to design that integrates marketing & commercial goals.

- Excellent communication, project management & cross-functional collaboration skills.

- Familiarity with regulatory communication standards or track record in health supplements or healthcare industry is a plus.



Please send your applications to

title: Customer Growth Assistant
description:
We are hiring a Customer Growth Assistant to support the execution and optimisation of client campaigns from onboarding through to completion. This role sits at the centre of operations, acting as the link between clients, media buyers, and internal teams to ensure campaigns run smoothly, issues are resolved quickly, and performance stays on track. You will be responsible for managing client onboarding, coordinating campaign requirements, monitoring performance, and maintaining clear, consistent communication with both clients and internal stakeholders.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

- Manage end-to-end client onboarding and campaign setup

- Coordinate campaign requirements with internal teams (media buyers, ops, tech)

- Monitor campaign performance and ensure smooth delivery

- Identify and resolve issues impacting campaign performance or lead flow

- Provide regular updates and check-ins with clients

- Handle client communication, requests, and problem resolution

- Track campaign progress and follow up on pending tasks

- Monitor client credit levels and flag risks early

- Ensure invoices are requested and processed on time

- Collect and report client feedback to improve performance

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

- Ability to manage multiple clients and tasks at once

- Clear and professional communication

- Problem-solving mindset with attention to detail

- Experience with CRM systems (preferred)

- Ability to work closely with cross-functional teams

title: Social Media & Operations Assistant (Proactive + Takes Initiative)
description:
My dogs name is Lucy.



I'm looking for someone who can take ownership of my social media and help me stay organized and on track day-to-day.



I have written my first book which is a memoir and I am in the weeds with this in between stage of editing and growing an online presence.  I am needing the most professional/unprofessional ally to work with in this stage.  Smart and fun with a very prominent dry/dark humor is important.  I want someone who is professional in the sense of what they can/will do, while  doing it it in an unprofessional kind of way.  I want someone who can understand this and also convey this to me in the best way possible.



I’m an author and content creator, and I’ll be honest—social media overwhelms me. I don’t struggle with ideas or showing up, but I do struggle with consistency, knowing what to post, and keeping everything moving.



I need someone who can step in and take the lead.



SOCIAL MEDIA (MOST IMPORTANT)



Create and post content consistently

D
 what to post and when (not waiting on me)

Write captions and keep content flowing

Engage with comments/messages

Bring me ideas for videos/content I can create

Help guide what works and what doesn’t



 + FILTERING



Organize my inbox

Filter important vs non-important
s

Research opportunities before bringing them to me

Draft or send simple replies



ORGANIZATION + TRACKING



Keep everything organized and easy to find

Track opportunities, contacts, and follow-ups

Make sure nothing falls through the cracks



SCHEDULING + FOLLOW-THROUGH



Manage my calendar

Keep me on track with what needs to happen

Follow up with me and others when needed



HOW I WORK



I want someone who takes initiative and doesn’t wait for instructions

You should be comfortable making decisions and moving things forward

We will have daily check-ins (quick and simple)



WHAT MATTERS MOST



You understand social media and how to keep content consistent

You are proactive and take ownership

You communicate clearly and consistently



One last detail:  Bring your best dry/dark humor into the subject line, give it your best shot :)

title: Senior QuickBooks Online Accountant (Cleanup & Client Advisory)
description:
Are you an advanced QuickBooks Online expert who can independently manage, clean up, and optimize complex accounting systems while guiding others on best practices?



Do you have experience diagnosing and correcting improperly structured QuickBooks Online accounts, including misclassified transactions, chart of accounts errors, and incomplete financial records?



This role is best suited for a professional who enjoys resolving complex accounting issues, exercising independent judgment, and contributing to the development of internal best practices. Candidates who require ongoing direction or prefer highly structured, task-based roles will not be a good fit.



We are seeking a long-term accounting professional to manage internal bookkeeping and accounting functions, while also supporting clients who utilize QuickBooks Online with varying levels of sophistication. This role includes both direct accounting work and client-facing responsibilities, including providing guidance, resolving issues, and ensuring adherence to best practices.



Requirements:

QuickBooks Online ProAdvisor certification (required)

Minimum of three (3) years of hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online

Formal accounting education (minimum two years), with strong preference for a four-year accounting degree or higher

Demonstrated experience handling complex or corrected accounting environments

Experience working with U.S.-based clients or accounting standards is highly preferred



Candidates must demonstrate a strong understanding of commission structures for contractor agents, trust account liabilities, and proper accounting treatment for each.

The role also requires the ability to lead and direct support staff using remote communication tools (e.g., Google Meeting or similar), ensuring that all entries are performed accurately and in accordance with established best practices.

Previous auditing or review experience is highly preferred.

Experience in real estate, insurance, or professional services environments is strongly preferred.



This is a high-responsibility role requiring full ownership of accounting functions. Candidates must be comfortable operating with minimal oversight, providing direction to staff, and ensuring that all financial records meet professional and compliance standards.



Work Environment Requirements:

Professional home office setup with a modern computer

Dual-monitor configuration (or equivalent)

Reliable high-speed internet

Quiet, distraction-free work environment

Experience working in a fully remote, team-based environment is preferred

Hours & Availability:

Minimum availability of 15 hours per week

Strong preference for those wanting 20-35 hours per week initially (can easily grow into full-time 40 hours once proven to work independently)

Must be committed to this role as primary professional engagement

Required availability Monday–Friday, 8:30 AM to 2:00 PM (Chicago time)

Additional hours as needed to meet weekly commitments

Compensation & Benefits:

Starting compensation of $12.00 per hour during the initial onboarding and evaluation period

Increase to $14.00 per hour after 45 days, based on demonstrated performance, reliability, and overall fit

Ongoing compensation increases based on performance, efficiency, and level of responsibility

Paid sick/vacation time provided

Opportunity for long-term growth and supervisory role if desired.



This is a long-term position with the opportunity to grow into a senior or leadership role within the organization.



Compensation is paid twice monthly via PayPal in U.S. Dollars (with the option to receive funds in USD or PHP).



Application Instructions:



To be considered for this position, please follow these instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow these steps will not be reviewed.



1. Include the word “Tax” in the subject line of your application.



2. Provide clear, written responses to the following questions:



A. Describe a specific QuickBooks Online cleanup project you personally worked on. Include:



The type of business

The exact problems you identified

The steps you took (in order)

What the books looked like before and after



B. A client has been incorrectly categorizing contractor commission payments as general expenses. How would you identify this issue, and how would you correct it to ensure proper financial reporting?



C. Describe your experience working with U.S.-based clients or accounting standards.



D. In your experience, what is one accounting mistake you initially handled incorrectly, and what did you learn from it?



E. Confirm your availability during Chicago business hours (8:30 AM – 2:00 PM CST), your total weekly availability, and whether this role will be your primary professional commitment.



3. Attach the following documents:



Resume

Cover letter

QuickBooks certifications and any other relevant certifications

Educational documentation (degree and/or transcripts, if available)



4. Include your earliest available start date and desired weekly hours.



4/14/26

title: Design Operations Associate
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized Design Operations Associate to support our architectural and design team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, enjoys working behind the scenes, and can keep projects, people, and systems running smoothly.



You will play a key role in ensuring the design department operates efficiently by handling administrative tasks, coordinating workflows, managing resources, and supporting the team in meeting deadlines and delivering high-quality work.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Provide efficient virtual office management support, including accurate processing of invoices, maintaining digital records, and assisting with online procurement tasks.

- Assist and coordinate with designers to ensure project tracking data is accurate and up to date.

- Help manage team accounts, assist with logins, and provide guidance on using tools such as Docusign, Dialpad, Lark Payment Requests, and others.

- Support designers with operational tasks such as sending documents via Docusign, submitting payment requests, scheduling meetings, coordinating projects, and working with other departments.

- Coordinate with consultants, request proposals, assist in scheduling site visits, track progress, and ensure timely submission of payments.

- Support the recruiting process for the design department by collating applicants from different platforms and scheduling interviews for shortlisted candidates.

- Ensure proper folder management and that all necessary documents are correctly stored in project folders.

- Assist in client contract processing by coordinating with sales, engineering, and finance teams, helping with contract drafting, payment reminders, and maintaining meeting records.

- Understand construction project processes, including phases, timelines, and deliverables, to help ensure smooth contract and project flow.

- Perform other tasks as needed to support the operations of the design team.



What We’re Looking For

- Bachelor's degree in Architecture, Engineering, or a related field.

- Proven experience in a project coordination, operations, or administrative role, preferably in a design-related environment.

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.).

- Basic knowledge of Revit, AutoCAD, and Bluebeam.

- Strong communication and presentation skills.

- Strong organizational skills with high attention to detail and accuracy.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.

- Knowledge of industry-specific standards, if applicable.



Why This Role is a Great Fit

- Long-term, stable remote role with a growing design team

- Work closely with architects, designers, and project managers

- Opportunity to grow within operations and project coordination

- Exposure to real-world architectural and construction workflows



How to Apply

Please submit your application along with your resume and a brief note/portfolio about your experience in operations, or any relevant experience.

title: Landscape Architect
description:
Position Summary

We are seeking a talented and detail-oriented Landscape Architect to join our remote design team. This role is responsible for developing high-quality landscape plans for residential projects in California while ensuring seamless coordination with our design group. The ideal candidate will have expertise in landscape design, site planning, and sustainability, with strong communication and collaboration skills for remote teamwork.



Key Responsibilities

- Design landscape plans for residential projects in California, ensuring aesthetic appeal and functionality.

- Create planting plans, hardscape layouts, irrigation designs, and outdoor living concepts tailored to client needs.

- Research and apply California-specific zoning, environmental, and planting regulations to design solutions.

- Develop technical drawings, site plans, and 3D renderings using industry-standard software.

- Coordinate closely with the design team, project managers, and consultants to align landscaping with overall project vision.

- Assist in concept presentations, material specifications, and design revisions based on client feedback.

- Stay informed on sustainable landscape practices, native plant selections, and water-efficient designs.

- Manage multiple projects while ensuring timely delivery of high-quality landscape plans.



Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Landscape Architecture, Architecture, or a related field.

- Proven experience in residential landscape design and remote collaboration.

- Proficiency in AutoCAD, SketchUp, Lumion, Adobe Creative Suite, and other landscape design tools.

- Strong understanding of California climate, planting guidelines, and sustainability principles.

- Excellent communication and coordination skills for working remotely with a U.S.-based team.

- Ability to manage time effectively and deliver quality work within project deadlines.

- Knowledge of irrigation systems, hardscape materials, and outdoor lighting is a plus.





Kindly send your CV/Resume and Portfolio and make sure it is accessible. Goodluck!

title: Permitting Coordinator (Architecture / Residential Projects)
description:
Position Summary:

We are seeking a highly organized and proactive architect to oversee the permit application process for residential projects in California. This role will involve coordinating with local building departments, ensuring compliance with regulations, and expediting permit approvals to keep projects moving efficiently. The ideal candidate will work closely with the design department to prepare required documentation, monitor project timelines, and communicate confidently with city officials, consultants, and internal teams.



Key Responsibilities:

- Manage the permit application process for residential projects, ensuring all submissions meet state and local regulatory requirements.

- Work closely with the design department to gather necessary plans, reports, and specifications for permit submissions.

- Liaise with city officials, building departments, and third-party consultants to facilitate approvals and resolve any permitting issues.

- Track and monitor permit timelines, providing regular updates to internal stakeholders to maintain efficient progress.

- Identify opportunities to expedite permit approvals by proactively addressing compliance requirements and coordinating necessary revisions.

- Ensure adherence to California building codes, zoning laws, and environmental regulations in all permit applications.

- Maintain organized documentation for permits, approvals, and project correspondence.

- Stay informed of changes in local permitting policies that may affect project timelines and requirements.



Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in Architecture, Construction Management, Urban Planning.

- Licensed Architect (preferred) or relevant experience in permit coordination for residential projects.

- Strong knowledge of California building codes, zoning regulations, and permit processes.

- Experience working with city agencies, planning boards, and regulatory bodies.

- Exceptional organizational skills and the ability to track multiple projects efficiently.

- Highly confident communicator with strong negotiation and problem-solving abilities.

- Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit, and other architectural documentation tools.

- Familiarity with permit expediting strategies and local jurisdiction requirements.



Send your CV and Portfolio, make sure it is accessible. Goodluck!

title: Loan Processor
description:
A Loan Processor is responsible for reviewing and processing loan applications, collecting all necessary documents, ensuring loans comply with the institution's guidelines and regulatory requirements. They work closely with loan officers, underwriters, and applicants to facilitate the loan approval process. 



Responsibilities: 

-Loan Application 

-Document Collection

-Communication with loan officers, underwriters

-Verify calculations, loan terms, and othe critical details

-Collaborate with transaction coordinators and other parties to facilitate the loan approval process



Requirements: 

-Bachelor's degree

-Over 1 year of experience in loan processrelated role

-Strong knowledge of loan products, lending policies, and regulations 

-Excellent attention to detail, organization, and time management skills 

-Ability to work in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment



PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME (PDF) WHEN APPLYING

title: Transaction Coordinator
description:
We are seeking a Transaction Coordinator to support our transaction team in a growing real estate company. This role involves managing all administrative aspects of the transaction from contract to close, including assisting with escrow-related documentation, communicating with internal departments, monitoring and scheduling key milestones and appointments, and maintaining accurate records and document management.



The ideal candidate will have excellent communication skills and enjoy working with people. If you are looking for an opportunity to grow your career in real estate, we encourage you to apply.



Key Responsibilities:

- Oversee all aspects of buyer and seller transactions from executed purchase agreement through closing

- Coordinate with title and escrow, lenders, and appraisers

- Assist with obtaining and confirming homeowners insurance quotes

- Maintain regular communication with agents, escrow officers, lenders, and all parties involved

- Prepare and submit required documentation to escrow, title, and lenders

- Coordinate inspection, repair, and appraisal timelines

- Manage moving and possession schedules

- Schedule and coordinate closing

- Maintain and update transaction management systems



Qualifications:

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills

- Strong attention to detail and ability to prioritize tasks effectively

- Service-oriented with a commitment to providing excellent client experience

- Experience in real estate, transaction coordination, title, or mortgage is preferred



PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME (PDF) WHEN APPLYING

title: Senior Financial Analyst
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a Senior Financial Analyst to join our growing real estate team.  This role will support development and investment decisions by building financial proforma models, analyzing project performance, and preparing reports for management. You’ll work closely with the US-based team on residential and multifamily real estate projects, helping evaluate feasibility, cash flows, and returns.



What You’ll Do

- Build and update Excel-based financial models for real estate development and investment projects.

- Analyze project costs, revenues, and returns (IRR, NPV, ROI, cash flow projections).

- Assist in budgeting, forecasting, and scenario analysis to support decision-making.

- Review market and economic data to ensure financial assumptions are realistic.

- Help prepare investment memos, presentations, and financial reports for management and investors.

- Coordinate with the market research and development teams to align assumptions and projections.

- Track ongoing project performance versus budget and highlight key variances.





Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Mathematics, or any related field.

- Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel - including financial modeling, formulas, and data analysis.

- At least 2–4 years of experience in financial analysis, investment modeling, or real estate development.

- Understanding of real estate finance concepts (pro forma, IRR, cap rate, yield, absorption, etc.).

- High attention to detail and excellent analytical and quantitative skills.

- Ability to communicate complex financial information clearly.

- Familiarity with real estate markets (especially in the US or Bay Area) is a plus.

- Experience using tools like Microsoft 365 is an advantage.



Preferred Attributes

- Strong interest in real estate investment and development.

- Enjoys working with numbers and models and solving analytical problems.

- Organized, detail-oriented, and reliable in meeting deadlines.



Working Hours

- Required to follow 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Standard Time

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – Real Estate Team
description:
Location: Remote

Reports To: Sales Manager / Team Lead

Type: Full-Time

Compensation: Base + Bonus



Job Summary:

We are looking for a proactive and motivated Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our growing real estate team. The SDR will play a key role in generating new business opportunities by engaging potential clients, nurturing leads, and setting qualified appointments for our agent team. This position is ideal for someone who is organized, persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, goal-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities:

- Prospect and qualify leads through phone calls, text,
, and CRM outreach.

- Respond promptly to inbound inquiries from online platforms, social media, or marketing campaigns.

- Conduct initial needs assessments to understand buyers’ or sellers’ timelines, goals, and motivation.

- Schedule listing or buyer consultation appointments for senior agents.

- Maintain accurate records of leads and activity in the team CRM (e.g., Salesforce).

- Collaborate closely with the marketing and operations teams to optimize lead conversion.

- Track daily activity metrics — calls, texts,
s, appointments set, and conversion rates.

- Follow up with past clients, warm leads, and sphere contacts to generate repeat and referral business.

- Continuously learn about new construction communities, local market trends, and loan products to better engage prospects.



Qualifications:

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills — comfortable engaging with potential clients over the phone and online.

- Highly organized, self-motivated, and able to manage multiple lead sources simultaneously.

- Prior experience in real estate sales, inside sales, customer service, or telemarketing preferred.

- Familiarity with real estate CRM systems and marketing automation tools is a plus.

- Goal-oriented with a strong sense of accountability and urgency.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

- Qualified appointments set per week/month.

- Lead-to-appointment conversion rate.

- Response time to inbound leads.

- Follow-up consistency and pipeline activity.

- Contribution to overall team closings.

Join Us!

At Axis Homes Realty LLC, we value teamwork, growth, and a client-first mindset. Joining our tea
ans being part of a supportive and collaborative environment where your contributions make a real impact. If you’re passionate about real estate operations and ready to grow your career with a company that values excellence and integrity, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Executive Support Specialist – Licensed Professional Tracks
description:
Executive Support Specialist – Licensed Professional Tracks

Reports to: CEO



Role Overview:

We are seeking highly qualified Attorneys, CPAs, or Licensed Educators to provide strategic executive support to the CEO. This role blends professional expertise with high-level administrative responsibilities, requiring discretion, precision, and proactive initiative.



1. Attorney

Responsibilities:

-Provide strategic support to the CEO in legal and executive matters, managing priorities, correspondence, and follow-ups with minimal oversight.

-Review, draft, and finalize contracts, legal memoranda, and other professional documents with precision and adherence to legal standards.

-Maintain and optimize digital and physical documentation systems for legal, corporate, and operational efficiency.

-Track deadlines, filings, and regulatory obligations across multiple projects to ensure compliance and mitigate risk.

-Coordinate legal meetings, court dates, and executive appointments, anticipating scheduling needs.

-Conduct legal research, prepare briefs, and summarize complex legal information for strategic decision-making.

-Handle confidential and sensitive legal and corporate information with the highest ethical standards.

-Identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement best practices in legal and operational processes.



2. CPA Track

Responsibilities:

-Provide strategic financial and operational support to the CEO, managing priorities, reports, and follow-ups proactively.

-Prepare, review, and analyze financial statements, budgets, forecasts, and professional correspondence with accuracy and compliance.

-Maintain and enhance digital and physical recordkeeping systems to ensure precise financial documentation and reporting.

-Track deadlines, deliverables, and fiscal obligations across multiple projects, ensuring adherence to regulatory and corporate standards.

-Coordinate executive and financial meetings, ensuring seamless scheduling and preparation of supporting materials.

-Conduct financial research, prepare summaries, and provide actionable insights to guide executive decisions.

-Handle sensitive financial and operational information with integrity and discretion.

-Identify and implement process improvements to optimize financial workflows and executive reporting.



3. Licensed Educator Track

Responsibilities:

-Provide high-level executive support to the CEO in education-related and administrative initiatives, managing priorities and deliverables with minimal supervision.

-Draft, review, and prepare professional reports, educational proposals, correspondence, and presentations with clarity and precision.

-Organize and maintain digital and physical records for instructional programs, projects, and operational documentation.

-Track deadlines, projects, and educational initiatives to ensure timely execution and alignment with organizational goals.

-Coordinate meetings, workshops, and events with internal teams, stakeholders, and educational partners.

-Conduct research, analyze educational trends, and prepare concise summaries to support informed strategic decisions.

-Handle sensitive educational and organizational information with professionalism, confidentiality, and ethical integrity.

-Identify opportunities to improve processes, workflows, and operational efficiency within the educational context.

title: VA Accountant
description:
We are looking for a VA Accountant with experience in U.S. tax accounting to prepare and review individual and business tax returns, ensure IRS compliance, and support tax planning and financial reporting. The role requires strong knowledge of QuickBooks and SAGE Intacct, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently in a remote setting while collaborating with the finance team during PST business hours.



Responsibilities:

-Prepare and review tax returns for individuals and businesses.

-Ensure all filings meet U.S. tax regulations and requirements.

-Assist in tax strategy development to boost financial efficiency.

-Stay on top of tax law changes and conduct research as needed.

-Support financial reporting for audits and tax-related documentation.

-Collaborate with the finance team to manage inquiries and ensure smooth operations.

-Keep accurate and organized financial records.



Qualifications:

-Proficiency in QuickBooks and SAGE Intacct is a must; CPA certification is a big plus.

-Solid experience in U.S. tax accounting (corporate & individual).

-Familiarity with tax software (e.g., QuickBooks, SAGE).

-Strong knowledge of IRS regulations and tax compliance.

-Detail-oriented, with excellent problem-solving skills.

-Strong communication skills (written & verbal).

-Ability to work independently and meet deadlines in a remote setting.

-3-5 years of relevant experience in tax accounting (preferred)

title: Media Buyer (Meta Ads) – Remote
description:
Media Buyer (Meta Ads) – Remote



We are looking for an experienced Media Buyer to manage Meta ad campaigns across multiple client accounts.



This role is not for beginners. You will be responsible for performance, communication, and consistency across a portfolio of clients in the home improvement space.



---



What You’ll Be Doing



Managing and optimising Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns

Handling multiple client accounts at once

Monitoring performance and making data-driven decisions daily

Working closely with our internal team (CSMs, SDRs, creatives)

Ensuring campaigns are delivering consistent lead flow and results



---



Requirements



Minimum $250,000 in ad spend managed (must be proven)

At least 4+ years of experience running Meta ads

Experience working with local service businesses

Strong preference for experience in home improvement (bathrooms, kitchens, windows, roofing, etc.)

Previous agency experience (used to managing multiple clients simultaneously)

Strong communication skills – must speak fluent English

Ability to work within a team and communicate clearly



If you haven’t worked in an agency before, your results and experience must be exceptionally strong.



---



Working Hours



8:00 AM – 6:00 PM (UK time)



---



Compensation



$2,000/month base salary

Performance bonus: $500 – $1,000/month



Bonuses are tied directly to performance.

If you are not hitting the minimum performance standard, this role is not for you.



---



Important



This is a full-time role.

If you take this position, you must not be working with any other clients or agencies.



We are looking for someone fully committed who will work exclusively with us.



---



Who This Is For



Someone **hungry and driven

Someone who takes ownership and responsibility

Someone who understands that results matter

Someone who is comfortable working in a fast-paced agency environment



---



Who This Is NOT For



* Beginners or junior media buyers

* Freelancers juggling multiple unrelated projects

* Anyone who cannot handle multiple clients or team communication



---



How to Apply



To apply, you **must send a Loom video (1–2 minutes)** covering:



* Your experience

* Ad spend managed

* Industries you’ve worked in

* Case studies or results



Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Senior Media Buyer
description:
Media Buyer Who Thrives on Full Campaign Ownership & Performance

We're hiring a results-oriented Media Buyer who thrives on autonomy and accountability. In this role, you'll have complete ownership of client advertising campaigns from initial setup through ongoing optimization managing everything needed to drive exceptional performance.

If you love the challenge of scaling ad accounts, testing creative hypotheses, and translating performance data into profitable strategies, this opportunity is for you.

Your Core Responsibilities:

Campaign Management & Strategy



Design and launch complete
 ad accounts, including full campaign architecture

Craft attention-grabbing ad copy and headlines that convert browsers into leads

Build sophisticated targeting strategies aligned with client goals

Launch multiple campaign tests to identify winning combinations

Perform daily campaign monitoring with hands-on optimization

Interpret performance metrics and implement data-backed improvements



Conversion Optimization & Page Building



Build landing pages designed specifically to convert traffic into appointments

Design A/B test variations to identify highest-performing page elements

Track landing page metrics daily and identify conversion bottlenecks

Continuously refine page design, messaging, and user flow to boost results



Asset Utilization & Content Coordination



Leverage our extensive Google Drive library of client videos, custom imagery, project photos, and brand materials

Review detailed client intake documentation containing all campaign specifications

Coordinate with the Client Success Manager for additional content only when strategically necessary



Team Collaboration



Partner closely with our Client Success Manager as your main point of contact

Receive strategic updates on offer changes, guarantee adjustments, targeting shifts, or campaign direction

Request supplementary assets proactively when performance opportunities require them



The Ideal Candidate:

Must-Have Qualifications:



3+ years hands-on
 Ads management with documented performance results

Proven expertise in direct response marketing and lead generation

Strong persuasive writing ability for ads and landing page content

Hands-on experience creating and optimizing landing pages (platform experience required)

Comprehensive knowledge of
 Ads Manager, campaign architecture, and audience targeting

Analytical approach with strong data interpretation skills

Sharp eye for detail and natural ability to identify performance improvements

Self-starter who excels working independently across multiple accounts

Comfortable with CRM platforms and project management software



Bonus Points For:



Experience implementing conversion tracking 
 Pixel, Google Analytics, etc.)

Design capabilities or familiarity with tools like Canva or Adobe Creative Suite

Background in home services, trades, or service-based business marketing

Knowledge of funnel optimization and customer journey mapping



Performance Indicators:



Campaigns consistently meeting or surpassing client performance targets

Landing pages showing strong conversion rates with measurable improvement over time

Proactive optimization driven by performance insights

Efficient collaboration with minimal back-and-forth on content needs

Tangible business growth for clients resulting from advertising efforts



What We Offer:



Competitive salary plus unlimited performance-based bonuses

Rapidly expanding agency with clear advancement pathways

Fully remote position with schedule flexibility

Budget allocated for professional development and training

Opportunity to advance into senior marketing leadership roles

Access to premium marketing platforms and tools

Paid sick leave

Monday-Friday schedule - weekends completely off!



Application Process:

REQUIRED: Submit a 2-3 minute personalized video addressing:



Your background and experience in paid media

A campaign you're particularly proud of - what results did you achieve and what was your strategy?

What makes you the perfect fit for this position?



Upload to YouTube (unlisted), Loom, or similar platform and share the link with your application.

Applications submitted without video will be automatically disqualified.

title: Virtual Assistant (GoHighLevel & Systems Specialist)
description:
## Virtual Assistant – Social Hotspot



We are hiring a sharp, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to support our marketing agency with backend systems, onboarding tasks, data accuracy, and software management.



This is not a basic admin role. We need someone who is fast with tech, organised, accurate, and able to learn new systems quickly.



### Working Hours



8:00 AM to 6:00 PM UK time



### Pay



$1,500/month + performance bonuses



### What You’ll Be Doing



* Managing Google Drive, including Google Sheets, Docs, and Slides

* Updating and maintaining 
 boards accurately

* Working inside GoHighLevel for:



  * automations

  * settings

  * landing pages

  * general account setup and support

* Supporting backend setup and technical tasks

* Keeping systems organised and up to date

* Helping with onboarding-related setup tasks

* Troubleshooting software and tech issues quickly



### What You Must Be Good At



* Google Sheets and the wider Google Drive environment

* GoHighLevel

* 

* Learning new software quickly

* General IT / tech problem-solving

* Working accurately without needing constant supervision



### Ideal Candidate



* Strong attention to detail

* Fast learner

* Comfortable with software and systems

* Good with computers and tech in general

* Can follow processes properly

* Can solve problems independently

* Reliable and organised



### Bonus Skills



* Experience with Appointwise

* Experience with Hot Prospector



### Important



We are looking for someone who is smooth with systems, quick with tech, and can keep things accurate and organised behind the scenes.



If you are slow with software, need lots of explanation, or struggle with detail, this role is not for you.



### How to Apply



Send:



* A 1-2 minute loom video going over:

- Your experience with Google Sheets, GoHighLevel landing pages and automations, and 

- Why you want to be part of Social Hotspot (be honest, whatever the reason might be)

title: Client Services & Administration Officer
description:
Job Overview





The Client Services & Administration Officer plays a critical role in supporting client operations through efficient invoicing, accurate data management, structured communication, and seamless system coordination.





This role is best suited for a highly organized and detail-oriented professional who thrives in a structured, process-driven environment. The ideal candidate is a fast learner who can work efficiently under pressure, manage multiple tasks, and maintain a high level of accuracy at all times.

 for task tracking and workflow management

title: SEO Specialist (Keyword Research, UX Optimization & Content Support)
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and results-driven SEO Specialist to support our digital marketing efforts. This role focuses on improving organic search performance through strategic keyword research, backlink support, on-page optimization, and enhancing page experience through thoughtful UI/UX and content presentation. The ideal candidate blends analytical thinking with creative execution.



---



Key Responsibilities



**Keyword Research & Strategy**



* Conduct in-depth keyword research to identify high-value opportunities for organic growth

* Analyze search intent and map keywords to appropriate pages and content types

* Monitor keyword rankings and adjust strategies based on performance trends



**Backlink Support**



* Assist with backlink outreach campaigns and relationship building

* Identify relevant link-building opportunities and partnerships

* Track backlink profiles and monitor domain authority improvements



**On-Page SEO & UX Optimization**



* Optimize on-page elements, including titles, meta descriptions, headers, and internal linking

* Collaborate on improving page layout, structure, and user experience to increase engagement and conversions

* Recommend improvements to content hierarchy, readability, and overall usability



**Page Layout & Visual Content**



* Provide guidance on page design and layout to align with SEO and UX best practices

* Select and recommend high-quality images that enhance content and user engagement

* Ensure visual elements support SEO goals without compromising site performance



**Image Optimization & Alt Text**



* Create descriptive, keyword-informed alt text for all images

* Optimize image file names, sizes, and formats for faster load times and accessibility compliance



---



Qualifications



* 3+ years of experience in SEO or digital marketing

* Strong understanding of keyword research tools (e.g., Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Keyword Planner)

* Familiarity with backlink strategies and SEO outreach practices

* Knowledge of on-page SEO, UX/UI principles, and content optimization

* Basic understanding of HTML/CSS is a plus

* Strong analytical, organizational, and communication skills



---

Preferred Skills



* Experience with Google Analytics and Google Search Console

* Ability to interpret SEO data and translate insights into actionable recommendations

* A keen eye for design, layout, and user behavior

* Familiarity with image optimization tools and accessibility standards



---



What Success Looks Like



* Improved keyword rankings and organic traffic growth

* Increased engagement metrics (time on page, lower bounce rate)

* Growth in quality backlinks and domain authority

* Well-optimized, user-friendly pages that convert
