title: IA Content Creator
description:
The Opportunity

We're looking for a full-time AI Content Creator to join our creative team. Your mission: produce unlimited AI-generated video assets  B-rolls, UGC-style content, before/after sequences, and any visual content needed for our Meta ads.

This isn't just about using AI tools it's about mastering them. You'll be responsible for transforming creative briefs into high-quality video assets that look natural, engaging, and conversion-ready. The goal is to build a content engine that can produce volume without sacrificing quality.

Starting point: approximately 50 assets per week. Ultimate goal: automate and optimize your workflow to produce unlimited content at scale.

This is a long-term opportunity. We value consistency, mastery, and reward performance with bonuses when your content contributes to winning ads.



What You'll Be Doing

AI Video Generation

Creating high-quality AI-generated video content using tools like Kling, Runway, Pika, Sora, Luma, or similar platforms

Producing diverse content types: B-rolls, lifestyle scenes, product shots, UGC-style videos, before/after transformations, transitions

Delivering content in various formats and durations (from 2-second inserts to 1-minute UGC sequences)

Prompt Engineering

Crafting precise, detailed prompts that consistently produce high-quality outputs

Understanding how different AI models interpret instructions and optimizing prompts accordingly

This is the core skill the quality of your prompts directly determines the quality of the content

Brief Interpretation & Delivery

Receiving detailed video briefs via Loom from our Creative Strategist

Translating creative visions into finished AI-generated assets that match the brief exactly

Managing tasks through our Notion workspace and delivering to designated Google Drive folders

Quality Control & Optimization

Ensuring every asset meets quality standards: natural movement, proper lighting, no AI artifacts, correct aspect ratios

Continuously improving your workflow to increase output volume while maintaining quality

Finding ways to automate repetitive tasks and scale production toward unlimited output



What We're Looking For

Required Skills (Non-Negotiable)

Proven experience with AI video generation tools (Kling, Runway, Pika, Sora, Luma, or similar)  you must already know how to use these tools

Strong prompt engineering skills  you understand how to write prompts that produce consistent, high-quality results

Ability to produce volume without sacrificing quality  speed and precision matter equally

Understanding of video formats, aspect ratios, and technical requirements for social media ads

Excellent attention to detail  spotting and fixing AI artifacts, unnatural movements, or quality issues

Portfolio showcasing AI-generated video content you've personally created

Personality Traits

Process-Driven: You thrive in structured environments with clear workflows and can manage multiple tasks efficiently

Quality-Obsessed: You don't deliver anything that doesn't meet your own high standards

Self-Motivated: You can work independently, manage your time effectively, and deliver consistently without micromanagement

Fast Learner: AI tools evolve constantly  you stay updated on new features, models, and techniques

Highly Responsive: You communicate clearly, respond promptly, and flag issues before they become problems

Nice to Have

Previous experience creating content for e-commerce brands or Meta Ads

Experience with multiple AI video platforms (versatility across tools)

Understanding of what makes ads convert (hooks, storytelling, emotional triggers)

Experience with AI avatar/UGC tools like Arcads, HeyGen, or Synthesia

Basic video editing skills for post-processing (upscaling, color correction, stabilization)



Our Workflow

We have a streamlined, fully automated process in place:

You receive tasks in our Notion workspace with clear briefs and deadlines

Each task includes a detailed Loom video explaining exactly what's needed

You create the AI-generated content using your preferred tools

You upload completed assets to the Google Drive folder linked to each Notion task

Our video editors take your assets and incorporate them into final ad creatives



What We Offer

Base Salary: $1,280/month for 40 hours/week ($8/hour)

Trial Period: 1-month evaluation period

Performance Bonuses: After the trial period, earn bonuses based on output and content performance

Tool Flexibility: Use whatever AI tools work best for you  we care about results, not specific platforms

Clear Processes: Everything is organized in Notion with detailed Loom briefs  no guesswork

Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere with a stable internet connection

Growth Opportunity: Be part of a scaling brand with long-term potential



How to Apply

To be considered for this position, please complete our application form with:

Your CV/Resume

Portfolio of AI-Generated Videos  show us your best AI-generated content (Google Drive, Vimeo, or similar link)

Answers to this Form : 

Availability confirmation for 40 hours/week

title: Web Developer (WordPress / WooCommerce / Shopify / AI Tools)
description:
Media Resellers is looking for an experienced Web Developer to join our team in a part-time role that may transition into full-time after a 3-month probationary period based on performance, reliability, and overall fit.



We are not looking for entry-level applicants.



We need someone who already has real experience, can work efficiently, can follow instructions, can communicate properly, and can complete tasks with less to no micromanagement.



We care about results, quality of work, reliability, and updates. We do not use time trackers. As long as the work is completed properly, on time, and as expected, that is what matters to us.



We use ClickUp for task management, so experience with ClickUp or similar project management tools is a plus.



We also offer performance-based bonuses, including for new tea
mbers who perform well.



(ABOUT THE ROLE)



You will be helping with development and ecommerce-related work across different projects. This includes website building, edits, fixes, page design implementation, theme work, ecommerce support on Shopify when asked, and using AI tools to assist with content and multimedia-related tasks when needed.



You must already have solid experience with most or all of the following:

- Custom WordPress development

- Custom WordPress themes

- Elementor

- Divi

- WooCommerce

- Ecommerce websites

- Website fixes and updates

- Working independently with minimal supervision

- Using AI tools such as ChatGPT for copywriting or task support

- Using AI tools such as Veo 3.1 or similar models/tools for multimedia needs



(PLUS POINTS IF YOU ALSO HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH)



- Shopify

- Shopify Liquid

- Shopify theme edits/customization

- Ecommerce conversion-focused development

- ClickUp or similar task/project management systems



We are looking for someone who can do the job properly without needing excessive back-and-forth for every small step.



We do not want someone who waits around too much or asks unnecessary questions when the task is already clear. Of course, smart clarifying questions are fine when truly needed, but overall we want someone who can take ownership, move efficiently, and get things done.



We will ask for updates from time to time so the team stays informed, but this is not a micromanaged role.



(IMPORTANT)



Please only communicate through OnlineJobs.ph.



Any attempt to move communication outside the platform during the application stage will be ignored.



If you cannot follow instructions properly, please skip this job post. We are only looking for serious applicants.



*TO APPLY, YOU MUST SUBMIT ALL OF THE FOLLOWING*

- Updated CV

- Updated portfolio

- Cover letter



Applications missing any of the above may be ignored.



*YOU MUST ALSO ANSWER ALL QUESTIONS BELOW*



- How many years of experience do you have in web development?

- How many years of experience do you have with WordPress?

- Describe your experience with custom WordPress themes.

- Describe your experience with Elementor, Divi, and WooCommerce.

- Do you have experience with Shopify? If yes, describe your experience with Shopify and Shopify Liquid. *if none, skip*

- What ecommerce projects have you worked on recently? Please include links if available.

- What AI tools do you currently use in your workflow? Explain how you use them.

- Are you a team player? If yes, explain professionally and give a real example.

- Can you work in a fast-paced environment? Explain how you handle urgent tasks, shifting priorities, and pressure.

- Tell us about a recent technical or work-related challenge you experienced. How did you solve it?

- What project management tools have you used? Do you have experience with ClickUp or similar platforms?

- What are your current computer specifications?

- What is your current internet speed? Please test it using 
 and include the result.

- Do you have a backup internet connection? If yes, what is it?

- Do you have backup power such as a power station, UPS, or any reliable alternative?

- What is your expected hourly rate?

- When can you start?

- Why do you think you are a strong fit for this role?



(COMPUTER SPECS INSTRUCTIONS)



Please include your computer specs in your application.



(INTERNET AND POWER RELIABILITY)



Since we are hiring in the Philippines, reliability matters a lot. Internet outages and power interruptions are common, and we need tea
mbers who are prepared. Please clearly state whether you have:



*THIS IS ONLY OPTIONAL, SKIP IF YOU DO NOT HAVE*



- Backup internet

- Backup power

- A proper work setup that allows you to continue working during interruptions when possible



(PLEASE ANSWER THIS SCENARIO PROFESSIONALLY)



- A client reports that their WooCommerce checkout stopped working after a recent plugin or theme update. Orders are failing, and this is affecting sales. At the same time, you still have two other tasks assigned for the day. What would you do first, how would you investigate the issue, and how would you communicate with the team? Include the answer to your message.



*FINAL INSTRUCTION - READ CAREFULLY*



To confirm that you really read this entire job post, do the following:



At the very top of your application message, place the correct answer to this question:



What is this website when read backwards?



moc.srelleser-aidem



Also, your application must contain a minimum of 15 POINTS. Applications that do not follow this instruction, do not include the correct answer at the top, or do not answer all required questions will be ignored.



*We do not want AI-generated answers. We use tools that detect whether submitted responses are AI-generated. We are looking for honest, direct answers that genuinely reflect your own thoughts and experience.*



See you soon. We can't wait to have you onboard!

title: Playwright + TypeScript Browser Automation Developer
description:
We are looking for a skilled developer to write browser automation scripts using Playwright and TypeScript. This is ongoing part-time work with tasks assigned regularly.

Your job will be to build reliable, well-structured automation functions that interact with web platforms.



What we expect from your code:

- Clean, strongly-typed TypeScript — no any types, no hardcoded values

- Proper async/await usage for all browser operations

- Logic split across multiple files by feature

- Comments explaining complex sections

- Reusable helper functions where appropriate



You will be provided with a shared types file that defines the data structures used across the project. You are expected to follow it strictly and not redefine or modify it.



Before hiring, we will send you a short paid test task to evaluate your coding style, problem-solving approach, and attention to detail. Only candidates who complete the task will be considered.

title: Web & Graphic Designer
description:
Location: Remote 

Company: Diversified Group with operations in Australia, China, and Hong Kong  

Industries: Professional Services, Agriculture

Job Type: Full-time, Permanent  

Salary: Competitive package commensurate with experience 



About Us  



We are a dynamic and diversified group running two distinct businesses across the Asia-Pacific region: 



- A Professional Accountancy & Advisory Firm with offices in Sydney, Shenzhen, and Hong Kong. 



- Strawberry Farms in Victoria and Queensland, Australia. 



 

We are looking for a Web & Graphic Designer to join our marketing team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating visually compelling designs and supporting the development and maintenance of websites for our brands and clients. 



This role focuses primarily on graphic design and web design/development, while also supporting marketing initiatives through creative assets, landing pages, and digital content. 



If you are interested in working with international brands, developing practical design and web skills, and contributing to high-impact marketing campaigns, we’d love to hear from you. 



Role & Responsibilities 



The responsibilities of this role are varied and involve both creative and technical tasks. While experience in some areas is preferred, we are happy to provide training for the right candidate. 



Key responsibilities include: 



- Design high-quality visual assets for digital use (social media, ads, websites, presentations, and marketing materials) 



- Create and maintain website pages and landing pages (UI/UX design and basic front-end implementation) 



- Ensure all designs are aligned with brand guidelines and visual identity 



- Collaborate with the marketing team to produce creatives for campaigns and promotions 



- Design and optimize landing pages to improve user experience and conversion rates 



- Assist in updating and maintaining website content (text, images, layout) 



- Develop wireframes, mockups, and prototypes for web pages and campaigns 



- Optimize designs for responsiveness across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices 



- Work with tools such as Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, or similar platforms 



- Support basic front-end development tasks (e.g., HTML/CSS edits, CMS updates like WordPress or Webflow) 



- Ensure fast-loading, visually appealing, and user-friendly web experiences 



- Stay up to date with the latest design trends, tools, and web technologies 



- Collaborate with internal teams to ensure designs meet marketing and business objectives 



Preferred Skills:



- Strong graphic design skills with a solid portfolio (digital and web projects) 



- Proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva or similar 



- Basic knowledge of web design principles (UI/UX, responsive design) 



- Familiarity with CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress, Webflow, Shopify) is a plus 



- Basic understanding of HTML/CSS is an advantage 



- Strong attention to detail and a good eye for aesthetics and layout 



- Good communication skills and ability to take feedback constructively 



- Organized and able to manage multiple design projects simultaneously 



- A proactive attitude and willingness to learn 



Requirements:



- 2–4+ years of experience in graphic design, web design, or a related role 



- Strong portfolio showcasing both graphic and web design work 



- Experience designing for digital platforms (websites, social media, ads, etc.) 



- Experience with website builders or CMS platforms 



- Understanding of design fundamentals (typography, color, layout, hierarchy) 



- Ability to translate marketing requirements into effective visual designs 



- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) 



- Experience working in a remote or collaborative team environment is an advantage 



- Bachelor’s degree in Design, Multimedia Arts, Computer Science, or a related field is preferred but not required 



 



What We Offer 



Diverse Challenge: Escape the monotony of a single industry. Apply your skills across three fascinating and different businesses. 



Professional Growth: This role reports directly to the Marketing Manager and offers significant scope for career advancement as the companies grow.  



Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere in the Philippines with a stable internet connection.  



Competitive Compensation: A salary package that rewards expertise and results, plus opportunities for performance-based bonuses.  



Supportive Environment: You will have the full backing of the ownership team and access to the resources needed to succeed. 



 



How to Apply 



Ready to build something exceptional? Please send your application to 
 with the subject line: "Application: Web & Graphic Designer - [Your Name]". Your application must include: 



Your updated CV/Resume. 



A cover letter that addresses: 1. Why you are interested in creating graphics for two different businesses. 2. A brief example of a successful creative campaign you have led (mention the channels and key results). 3. Your salary expectation. 



(Optional but highly valued) Links to your portfolio, LinkedIn profile, or any relevant case studies. Applications without a cover letter will not be considered. 



We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity in our team.

title: Junior Meta Ads Media Buyer Needed (Full-Time, 100% Remote)
description:
WHO ARE WE?



We’re Nooro - a fast-growing app company operating alongside a highly profitable eCommerce business, doing over $100M per year. 





WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?



We need a Jr. Media Buyer to manage day-to-day campaign operations in our Meta ad account under the direction of our senior media buyer.



This is primarily a creative testing execution role. You will be inside Ads Manager daily building out new creative tests, launching ads, managing budgets, QA-ing everything before publish, and reporting on performance. Expect 90% of your time to be setting up and managing creative tests across client accounts.



HOW TO APPLY: If you believe we're the right fit, please fill in this form:





RESPONSIBILITES



•    Build and launch new creative tests across multiple client accounts — new ad variations, copy iterations, hook tests, format tests (static, video, carousel, UGC), and angle tests



•    Structure creative tests properly within campaign architecture (CBO, ABO, ASC, Advantage+ Shopping) based on the testing framework set by the senior buyer



•    QA every ad before publish: UTM parameters, creative assets, copy, placements, audience targeting, conversion events, and tracking verification



•    Monitor Advantage+ Creative Enhancements and platform-level automation settings, applying the correct protocol per client and creative type



•    Execute daily budget adjustments, ad toggling, and bid changes based on performance thresholds



•    Pull and organize creative performance data for weekly reporting (ROAS, CPA, CPM, CTR, Thumbstop, Hold Rate) so winning and losing creatives are clearly identified



•    Flag anomalies: spend pacing issues, delivery problems, rejected ads, pixel firing errors



•    Communicate async via Slack with clear status updates, questions, and blockers







REQUIREMENTS



• 6+ months hands-on experience inside Meta Ads Manager (not boosted posts, not watching courses — actually building and managing campaigns)



• Understands campaign structures: CBO vs. ABO, broad vs. interest targeting, dynamic creative vs. standard ads



• Experience setting up creative tests and knows how to isolate variables (hook, angle, format, copy) without muddying results



• Familiar with Meta Pixel, CAPI, and event-based conversion tracking



• Can navigate Business Manager: ad accounts, pixels, product catalogs, partner access



• Detail-oriented — the kind of person who double-checks UTMs and preview links before anything goes live



• Reliable async communicator. PST working hours required.







NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED)



• Experience with DTC/ecommerce brands



• Basic understanding of landing page CRO and how it connects to ad performance



• Comfortable with Google Sheets and Power BI for data pulls and reporting





This is a straightforward execution role with clear systems and expectations. We value precision, speed, and reliability.





Apply ONLY if you're looking for a full-time role in the long run, not a quick gig.





HOW TO APPLY: If you believe we're the right fit, please fill in this form:

title: Virtual Assistant/ Procurement Assistant
description:

, state/local systems)

nt.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: AI Video Editor (Remote)
description:
Job Overview



We are seeking a creative and tech-savvy AI Video Editor to join our team. This role combines traditional video editing skills with cutting-edge AI tools to produce high-quality, engaging video content efficiently. The ideal candidate is both creative and analytical, with a strong understanding of storytelling, automation, and emerging AI technologies in video production.



Key Responsibilities

*Edit and produce high-quality video content for marketing, social media, training, and internal use

*Leverage AI-powered tools to streamline editing workflows (e.g., automated cuts, captions, voiceovers, enhancements)

*Transform raw footage into compelling visual stories aligned with brand guidelines

*Generate and edit AI-driven content (e.g., avatars, voice synthesis, background generation)

*Optimize videos for different platforms (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.)

*Collaborate with marketing, content, and creative teams to meet project goals

*Stay updated on emerging AI tools and trends in video editing and content creation

*Manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment



Required Qualifications

*Proven experience as a Video Editor or similar role

*Hands-on experience with AI video tools such as Runway ML, Descript, Pictory, or similar

*Proficiency in traditional editing tools like Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

*Strong understanding of video formats, codecs, and compression

*Basic knowledge of motion graphics and visual effects

*Excellent storytelling, pacing, and visual composition skills

*Strong attention to detail and ability to work independently



Preferred Qualifications

*Experience creating AI-generated avatars or voiceovers using tools like Synthesia or ElevenLabs

*Familiarity with prompt engineering for creative content generation

*Basic graphic design skills (e.g., Canva, Photoshop)

*Experience working in a remote or distributed team



Key Skills

*AI Content Creation & Automation

*Video Editing & Post-Production

*Storytelling & Creative Direction

*Time Management & Organization

*Adaptability to Emerging Technologies

title: Tier 1 IT Support Technician (MSP Help Desk)
description:
We are seeking a driven, customer focused Tier 1 MSP Support Technician to join our growing team. In this role, you'll be the first line of support for our clients—helping with daily user issues, troubleshooting systems, managing Microsoft 365 environments, and ensuring smooth IT operations across diverse networks. 



This position is ideal for someone who enjoys problem solving, learning new technologies, and working in a fast-paced MSP (Managed Service Provider) environment. 



Working hours aligned with U.S. business hours (Central Time)



To confirm you read this job description, include the phrase “Purple Server” in your application.

 



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Technical Support & Troubleshooting -

Provide Tier 1 support via phone,
, and remote tools. 

Troubleshoot Windows workstation issues, printers, network connectivity, and basic server interactions. 

Assist users with login issues, password resets, MFA setup, and account lockouts. 

Diagnose hardware issues (RAM, disk failures, peripherals, docks, etc.). 

OS, File Systems & Installation 



Install and configure Windows operating systems. 

Understand basic file systems (FAT32, NTFS, ext4, APFS) and partition concepts (UEFI/EFI, MBR/GPT). 

Networking Fundamentals 



Troubleshoot basic network issues using CMD or PowerShell. 

Understand IP addressing (DHCP vs static, public vs private IPs). 

Familiarity with DNS queries, name resolution, and common network protocols (DNS, DHCP, HTTP/S, SMB, RDP, FTP/SFTP, SSH). 

Awareness of firewalls, ports, and basic security principles. 

Microsoft 365 Administration 



Manage users, groups, and licenses. 

Support Exchange Online (delegate access, send-as, distribution lists, shared mailboxes). 

Troubleshoot SharePoint and OneDrive sync issues. 

Understand basic Azure AD/Entra ID concepts: groups, MFA, conditional access (Tier 1 level). 

Remote Tools, Imaging & MSP Operations 



Use remotesupport tools (ConnectWise Control/ScreenConnect, TeamViewer, AnyDesk). 

Create detailed documentation and ticket notes. 

Follow SLAs and escalate issues appropriately. 

 



- Required Skills & Knowledge -

Strong customer service and communication skills. 

Solid understanding of Windows OS and basic computer hardware. 

Basic networking knowledge. 

Familiarity with PowerShell/CMD for troubleshooting. 

Ability to multitask in a ticketdriven environment. 

Strong attention to detail and documentation. 

 



- Preferred Qualifications -

Experience with ConnectWise PSA/RMM. 

Exposure to Microsoft 365 administration. 

Basic Linux command-line familiarity. 

Experience with SharePoint/OneDrive management. 

Previous MSP or fast paced help desk experience.

title: Head of Sales
description:
Head of Sales (Influencer Brand)



We’re hiring a Sales Assistant / Community Manager for a fast-growing influencer brand.



This role is conversation-based sales — your job is to engage with followers, build natural connections, and guide conversations toward the follower purchasing our digital products.



If you’re the right fit, you will progress into a Head of Sales role, where you’ll:



* Train new tea
mbers

* Manage the full conversation/sales operation

* Earn commission on both your own performance and the team you manage

You will be trained by me. 



---



What You’ll Be Doing



* Chatting daily with followers as the influencer

* Building connection through natural, engaging conversation

* Subtly leading conversations toward sales (no hard selling)

* Learning and applying proven conversation frameworks

* Maintaining a consistent, authentic voice, keeping notes on followers who are verified (have purchased) to maintain strong rapport

Understand how to use the CRM.



---



Ideal Candidate



* 18–24 years old (or fully understands this demographic)

* Grew up in a Western social media environment (TikTok, IG, Snapchat)

* Has a natural Gen Z texting style

* Understands humor, pacing, and how real conversations flow

* Can sound like a real girl texting, not scripted or robotic

* Aware of trends, slang, and online culture

Chronically online, understands brain rot.



---



Compensation



* $100/week during training

* After Month 1: ~$1,000/month 

* Growth into Head of Sales with override commission on team performance. Each person you train and onboard you will take a cut of their sales.



---



How We Chat (Examples)



Good Example (Natural / Gen Z / Conversational)



* heyyy what brought u here lol

* omg stop ???? ur actually sweet, what should i call uuu

* okay wait now i’m curious about u, what do u do when ur not stalking me ????



? feels real, playful, slightly chaotic, human



Bad Example (Generic / Robotic / Corporate)



* Hello, thank you for your message. What do you do?

* Hi, nice to meet you, how are you today?



? feels fake, overused, or like a bot



---



Application Task (IMPORTANT)



Reply to ALL prompts below in your natural texting style:



1. Opener

   Follower: “hey”



2. Engagement

   Follower: “what are you doing”



3. Conversation Builder

   Follower: “idk what to say lol”



4. Personality Check

   Follower: “you seem different”



---



Final Instruction



Apply to this role in a Gen Z texting style, as if you were already doing the job. Use this application when messaging me to really show you understand how to speak like a genz (make it natural too)



This is a huge opportunity, I am looking for someone hungry motivated to work full time and even more. The pay reflects this, this is not a part time position, do not apply if you arent looking for something full time and life changing. If you want easy task completion VA work this is not for you. If you do not apply in a genz tone to the application, it will not even be read.

I am looking to genuinely change someone's life with this job, as it is so scalable. Only serious applicant only. 60 hour weeks.



If your application sounds formal or corporate, it will not be considered.



Last point- A lot of applicants are obviously using chatgpt for their responses, I can see it in 2 seconds, any chatgpt responses will be not be considered. Put the number 92 at the top of the application so I know you have read all of this. 



Thank you.

title: Lead Generation & Marketing Assistant — Remote | Long-Term
description:
Lead Generation & Marketing Assistant — Remote | Long-Term | Satou Agency



Location: Remote (Worldwide)

Schedule: Full-time

Salary: Competitive, based on experience + performance-based raises

Type: Long-term, stable position



About Us

Satou Agency is a fast-growing international PR & Digital Marketing agency helping exceptional professionals get noticed, trusted, and recognized worldwide. We work with clients across the USA, Europe, Asia, Africa, and CIS markets — specializing in strategic visibility, media placements, industry awards, and high-profile recognition opportunities.

We're a small, close-knit remote team — and we take hiring seriously. We're not looking for someone to fill a seat. We're looking for a person who is technically sharp, communicates with confidence, and wants to grow with us over the long term.



What This Role Is

This is a research, operations, and client communication role at the core of our business. You will build and maintain lead lists, manage CRM systems, support outreach campaigns, create materials, and communicate directly with international clients.

This role requires someone who can think analytically, handle structured data with precision, navigate multiple digital tools confidently, and write professional business English without hesitation. If you're organized, tech-savvy, and thrive in a clear system-driven environment — this role will suit you well.



What You'll Do Day-to-Day

Lead Generation & Outreach



Find and qualify leads on LinkedIn (advanced search) and other platforms

Research companies, decision-makers, and contact details

Build, structure, and maintain accurate contact databases



CRM &
 Automation



Manage and update CRM systems — primarily HubSpot and 

Create and maintain sales funnels and automation workflows

Build and execute targeted
 outreach campaigns, manage mailing lists



Data & Spreadsheet Management



Work with Google Sheets and Excel at a confident level — formulas, pivot tables, data structuring and cleanup

Keep all records organized, accurate, and up to date



Client Communication



Correspond with international clients via
 and messaging — professionally, clearly, and on time

Coordinate tasks and follow up internally to ensure nothing falls through the cracks



Presentations & Materials



Create polished presentations in Canva and PowerPoint for client pitches and internal use

Design basic marketing materials in Canva



AI & Tools



Use ChatGPT and other AI tools to streamline research, outreach, and daily workflows

Adapt quickly to new platforms and troubleshoot minor technical issues independently



Who We're Looking For

This role is best suited for someone with a technical or analytical background — IT, engineering, data, economics, or a related field — who has strong communication skills and is comfortable working in a fast-paced international environment.

Required:



Bachelor's degree in IT, Computer Science, Engineering, Economics, or a related technical field (or equivalent hands-on experience)

Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar role — lead generation, marketing operations, digital assistant, or technical support

Advanced English — written and spoken. You will correspond with international clients. Grammar, tone, and clarity are non-negotiable.

Expert-level Google Sheets / Excel — formulas, pivot tables, data organization

Hands-on experience with HubSpot, 
, or similar CRM / outreach platforms

Proficiency in Canva and PowerPoint for presentation and materials creation

Strong LinkedIn search and lead generation skills

Detail-oriented, self-organized, and able to meet deadlines independently



Strong plus:



Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator or 

Background in B2B marketing, tech, or PR/communications

Experience working with US or European clients directly

Familiarity with Adobe Photoshop, CapCut, or Adobe Premiere Pro





What We Offer



100% remote — work from anywhere

Long-term, stable position with strong preference for internal growth

Direct exposure to international clients and global markets

Clear processes, no micromanagement

Performance-based salary increases

Real growth path: Lead Gen Specialist ? Marketing Ops ? Senior Assistant / Team Lead





How to Apply

Send us a short message that includes:



A brief overview of your background and relevant experience (3–5 sentences)

Your English level and any experience communicating with international clients

One example of a research, data, or lead generation task you've completed

Tools you've worked with (Google Sheets, HubSpot, LinkedIn, AI tools, etc.)



We read every application personally. Candidates who meet our criteria will be invited to a short Zoom interview.

/in/nisonigmatullina

We are a boutique, fast-growing international PR and digital marketing agency based in Miami. We work with clients from the US, Europe, Asia, Africa, and CIS — founders, executives, and companies who need to build real visibility, not just press clippings. Our work spans earned media placements, conference speaking opportunities, lead generation, outreach, and digital marketing support. The team is lean. The work is real. The results are visible.



The Role

PR is changing fast. In 2026, a great media placement does two things at once: it builds reputation and feeds AI systems that shape how brands are discovered. We need someone who gets both sides — the craft of building journalist relationships and the new reality of earning citations in AI search (GEO). You're a strong communicator, a fast researcher, and you write pitches that people actually respond to. You don't wait for a brief. You already know what the story is.



What You'll Do



- Build and execute earned media campaigns — publications, expert columns, commentary pieces, and interviews

- Pitch stories to journalists and editors with hyperpersonalized outreach — not spray-and-pray

- Source and secure conference speaking opportunities and jury seats for clients

- Proofread and edit client materials: press releases, bios, expert articles, pitches

- Research media landscapes, journalist beats, editorial calendars, and event circuits

- Optimize content and placements for AI visibility (GEO) — structure stories to be cited, not just read

- Use AI tools to accelerate research, ideation, and outreach — but bring human judgment to everything that ships

- Track placements, report results clearly, and keep the pipeline moving without hand-holding





Requirements



- 2+ years of PR experience in an agency 

- A real publications portfolio: placements you personally pitched, placed, or wrote

- Strong proofreading and editing skills — you improve every text you touch

- Logical, structured thinking — you build a plan before you start sending
s

- Written and spoken English at B2 minimum, C1 preferred — you write all pitches yourself

- Higher education in communications, journalism, marketing, or a related field

- Hands-on experience with modern PR and AI tools — you know what's in your toolkit and how to use it

- Experience pitching US or European markets — you understand how editors and journalists in these regions think





Nice to Have



Understanding of GEO — how earned media feeds AI search and how to structure placements for machine citation

Experience with startup founders or executives on personal brand and thought leadership

Knowledge of the conference and awards circuit: who organizes what, how selection committees work

Existing contacts at US or EU business or tech publications

Additional language relevant to our markets: Russian, German, French, Hindi



What We Offer



International, diverse client roster — US, Europe, Asia, Africa, CIS

Small team where your work is visible and credited

Remote-friendly, flexible setup — we care about results, not where you sit

Room to grow fast if you're ambitious and reliable



How to Apply- IMPORTANT STEP

Send a short message — one screen, no scrolling. Tell us about one placement or campaign you personally delivered: what you pitched, who picked it up, and what the result was. Attach your CV and include a link to your publications portfolio (PDF also works).



No templates. No "I am a driven professional with a passion for communications." Show us a result — that's the only filter that matters.

title: Operations Coordinator / Client Success — Online Business Experience Required

-Time

About AiDus

AiDus is an operations and consulting company that helps international service businesses — coaches, consultants, agency owners — build and run their growth operations using Filipino talent and AI tools. We place trained Filipino operators into professionally built systems and manage the whole engine so founders can stay focused on growth.

Small team. Fast pace. No corporate layers.



Who We're Looking For

Someone who has already worked inside an online coaching or online service business — not in a content role, but on the operational side. You've managed workflows, tracked client progress, handled communications, kept things from falling through the cracks. You know what it looks like when a founder is overwhelmed and how to take things off their plate without being asked.

Long term, this role grows into a Client Success Manager position — the person who owns the client relationship after the sale, makes sure delivery is smooth, and keeps clients happy enough to stay and refer.

You are not someone who waits to be told what to do. You see what needs to happen and you handle it.

s, follow-ups, scheduling, check-ins

title: Outbound Sales Specialist — Clay, Cold Email & Loom Video Outreach
description:
We're a fast-growing B2B SaaS company looking for a full-time Outbound Sales Specialist to own and scale our outbound pipeline. Your #1 job is to increase qualified booked calls — target is 4 qualified calls booked per day.



You'll manage the entire outbound workflow end-to-end: building targeted prospect lists, crafting personalized outreach sequences, coordinating Loom video strategy with our sales rep, and relentlessly optimizing to hit the daily call target.



What You'll Do:



- Build and maintain ICP-based prospect lists using Clay (enrichment, waterfall logic, filters)

- Write and A/B test cold
 sequences (subject lines, copy, CTAs, follow-ups)

- Coordinate with our sales rep to record and deploy personalized Loom videos to high-value prospects

- Manage sending infrastructure — deliverability, warmup, domain rotation, inbox health

- Track and report on key outbound metrics daily:
s sent, open rates, reply rates, calls booked, call quality

- Own the "qualified booked calls" metric — identify bottlenecks and run experiments to improve conversion at every stage of the funnel

- Maintain and optimize our CRM pipeline so nothing falls through the cracks



You're a Great Fit If You Have:



- 1+ years of hands-on experience with Clay (building tables, enrichments, integrations)

- Strong cold
 copywriting skills — you know what gets replies

- Experience with
 sending tools (Instantly, Smartlead, Lemlist, or similar)

- Understanding of
 deliverability (SPF, DKIM, DMARC, warmup, domain rotation)

- Familiarity with Loom for personalized video outreach

- Data-driven mindset — you look at numbers daily and make decisions based on what the data says

- Self-starter who doesn't wait to be told what to do — you see a bottleneck, you fix it



Bonus Points:



- Experience with B2B SaaS sales or lead gen agencies

- Familiarity with LinkedIn outreach or multi-channel prospecting

- Experience with CRM tools (HubSpot, Close, or similar)



Why Join Us:



- Fully remote — work from anywhere

- High-impact role — you directly drive revenue

- Small, fast-moving team — no bureaucracy, lots of ownership

- Clear KPI: 4 qualified booked calls/day — hit it consistently and grow with us



To Apply:



Tell us about your experience with Clay and cold
. Include a specific example of an outbound campaign you ran — what was the ICP, what tools did you use, what were the results (reply rate, meetings booked, etc.)? We want to see that you've actually done this, not just read about it.
